description: En **övrig förmedlare** arbetar med att matcha och förmedla tjänster, produkter eller kontakter mellan parter – det kan röra sig om allt från fastighetsförmedling och rekrytering till försäkringsförmedling eller handelsmäkleri. Det dagliga arbetet består ofta av kundkontakt via telefon och e-post, hantering av avtal och dokumentation i CRM-system eller branschspecifika plattformar, samt research och marknadsbevakning. Arbetet är övervägande digitalt men innehåller också fysiska inslag som kundmöten, visningar eller nätverkande.

name: Systemadministratörer
rationale: System administrators work primarily digitally, managing IT infrastructure through remote administration tools, making much of their work susceptible to AI-driven automation and AIOps platforms that can handle monitoring, alerting, routine configuration, and user management tasks. However, the physical hardware handling, contextual troubleshooting of complex organizational environments, and need to coordinate with users and teams provides some barrier to full automation, keeping the score below the highest tier.
description: Swedish systemadministratörer arbetar primärt digitalt med att installera, konfigurera och underhålla organisationers IT-infrastruktur, inklusive servrar, nätverk och operativsystem (vanligtvis Windows Server, Linux eller liknande). De hanterar dagligen användarhantering, säkerhetskopiering, felsökning och övervakning av system via verktyg som Active Directory, VMware, Azure eller liknande plattformar. En del fysiskt arbete förekommer, till exempel hantering av hårdvara i serverrum, men merparten av arbetet sker digitalt via fjärradministration och övervakningsverktyg.

name: Chefstjänstemän i intresseorganisationer
rationale: This role is heavily office/computer-based — producing policy documents, reports, remiss responses, and managing communications — all tasks where AI can significantly boost productivity or partially automate outputs. However, the core value lies in stakeholder representation, political negotiation, relationship-building, and strategic advocacy, which require human judgment, trust, and real-world presence, creating a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: **Chefstjänstemän i intresseorganisationer** leder och samordnar verksamheten i fackförbund, arbetsgivarorganisationer, branschorganisationer eller ideella föreningar – vilket i praktiken innebär att de driver förhandlingar, representerar medlemmarnas intressen gentemot myndigheter och politiker, och ansvarar för strategiska beslut och budgetarbete. Det dagliga arbetet är övervägande digitalt och kontorsbaserat: de arbetar i Office-verktyg, ärendehanteringssystem och kommunikationsplattformar (Teams, e-post), producerar remissvar, rapporter och policydokument, och deltar i möten – både fysiska och digitala. En betydande del av arbetstiden ägnas åt externa kontakter, nät

name: Ekonomi- och finanschefer, nivå 1
rationale: Finance managers at this level work predominantly in digital environments using financial systems, Excel, and BI tools, making much of their analytical and reporting work highly susceptible to AI augmentation. However, their leadership responsibilities — managing teams, participating in executive decision-making, communicating with boards, and providing strategic judgment — require human authority and interpersonal skills that create a significant barrier to full automation.
description: **Ekonomi- och finanschefer, nivå 1** ansvarar för att leda och styra ett företags eller en organisations ekonomifunktion, vilket innefattar budgetering, finansiell rapportering, likviditetshantering och strategisk ekonomisk planering. Det dagliga arbetet är i hög grad digitalt och sker framför allt i ekonomisystem som SAP, Microsoft Dynamics eller Visma, samt i Excel och BI-verktyg som Power BI för analys och uppföljning. De leder ofta ett team av ekonomer och controllers, deltar i ledningsgruppsmöten och kommunicerar ekonomiska resultat och prognoser till ledning, styrelse och externa intressenter.

name: Ekonomi- och finanschefer, nivå 2
rationale: Finance managers at this level work almost entirely in digital environments using ERP systems, Excel, and BI tools — tasks like financial reporting, forecasting, and KPI analysis are highly susceptible to AI automation and augmentation. However, the strategic leadership responsibilities, stakeholder negotiations with banks and auditors, and organizational decision-making provide a meaningful human layer that prevents full displacement, placing this role in the manager/accountant range rather than the pure analyst tier.
description: **Ekonomi- och finanschefer, nivå 2** ansvarar för att leda och samordna en organisations ekonomifunktion, vilket innefattar budgetering, ekonomisk rapportering, likviditetshantering och finansiell analys. De arbetar dagligen i digitala verktyg som affärssystem (exempelvis SAP, Visma eller Dynamics 365), Excel och BI-verktyg (såsom Power BI) för att följa upp nyckeltal, upprätta prognoser och presentera beslutsunderlag för ledningen. Arbetet är till övervägande del digitalt och kontorsbaserat, med inslag av möten, förhandlingar och samarbete med revisorer, banker och interna avdelningar.

name: Personal- och HR-chefer, nivå 2
rationale: HR managers work predominantly digitally — managing systems, documentation, reporting, and policy — which AI can substantially augment or automate, reducing headcount needed per organization. However, the role involves significant interpersonal judgment: union negotiations, employee relations, organizational politics, and trust-sensitive conversations that require human discretion and accountability, creating a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: **Swedish HR Managers (SSYK 1222)** primarily plan, coordinate, and oversee an organization's human resources functions, including recruitment, staffing, salary administration, labor law compliance, collective bargaining (kollektivavtal), and employee development. Their daily work involves managing HR systems such as Workday, SAP HR, or Visma, handling documentation, conducting meetings with union representatives, line managers, and employees, and producing reports and policy frameworks. The work is **predominantly digital and office-based**, centered on administrative platforms, email, video meetings, and data-driven workforce planning, with regular interpersonal interaction in both physical and remote settings.

name: Förvaltnings- och planeringschefer
rationale: Administration and planning managers work predominantly in a digital, office-based environment involving report drafting, budgeting, strategic planning, and coordinating via ERP and office tools — all tasks where AI can significantly augment or partially automate the workload. However, the role retains substantial human elements such as organizational leadership, stakeholder negotiation, judgment-based decision-making, and managing people, which creates a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: **Swedish Administration and Planning Managers (SSYK 1230)** primarily oversee and coordinate administrative functions, business planning, and operational processes within organizations — directing staff, setting procedures, and ensuring that support functions such as HR, finance, IT, and facilities run efficiently. Their daily work involves meetings, drafting reports and policy documents, budgeting, and strategic planning, carried out largely through digital tools such as ERP systems (e.g., SAP or Visma), office suites, and project management platforms. The work is predominantly office-based and digital, centered on email, video conferences, and data-driven decision-making, with relatively little physical or hands-on activity.

name: Informations-, kommunikations- och PR-chefer, nivå 1
name_en: Information, communication and public relations managers, level 1
rationale: This role is primarily digital and computer-based, making it inherently exposed to AI tools that can automate content drafting, media monitoring, sentiment analysis, and campaign planning — reducing the need for large communication teams. However, the strategic leadership dimension, stakeholder relationship management, crisis judgment, and organizational authority require human credibility and accountability that limits full automation exposure.
description:
## Informations-, kommunikations- och PR-chefer, nivå 1 (SSYK 1241)

These managers lead and coordinate an organization's communication strategy, including press relations, internal communication, social media presence, and brand messaging, often overseeing a team of communicators and PR specialists. Their daily work is **primarily digital**, involving tools such as CMS platforms, media monitoring software (e.g., Retriever, Meltwater), social media management tools, and presentation software, alongside meetings, briefings, and stakeholder correspondence. They also handle crisis communication planning, approve content and campaigns, and act as a key liaison between the organization and media, the public, or political stakeholders.

name: Informations-, kommunikations - och PR-chefer, nivå 2
name_en: Information, communication and public relations managers, level 2
rationale: This role is heavily digital and computer-based — strategy development, content oversight, media relations, and analytics can all be significantly augmented or partially automated by AI tools for drafting, monitoring, and reporting. However, the managerial and leadership dimensions — crisis judgment, stakeholder relationships, editorial oversight, and team supervision — require human authority and trust-building that provides a meaningful buffer against full AI displacement.
description:
## Informations-, kommunikations- och PR-chefer, nivå 2 (SSYK 1242)

These managers lead and coordinate an organization's communication, PR, and information activities by developing communication strategies, managing media relations, and overseeing internal and external messaging across channels. Their daily work is predominantly digital and involves tools such as CMS platforms, social media management tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Sprout Social), press release distribution systems, analytics dashboards, and email/presentation software, alongside regular meetings with staff, journalists, and stakeholders. They typically split their time between strategic planning, content review and approval, crisis communication management, and supervising a team of communicators or PR specialists.

name: Försäljnings- och marknadschefer, nivå 1
rationale: Sales and marketing managers work predominantly digitally — analyzing data, preparing reports, managing CRM systems, and communicating via email and video — making significant portions of their work susceptible to AI augmentation or automation, particularly in data analysis, report generation, and campaign optimization. However, the senior strategic decision-making, relationship management with clients and partners, team leadership, and physical presence at events and meetings create meaningful barriers that keep full AI displacement limited, placing this role in the manager/executive range of exposure.
description: **Swedish Sales and Marketing Manager (SSYK 1251, nivå 1)** primarily leads and coordinates a company's sales and marketing operations at a senior level, setting strategies, managing budgets, and directing teams of sales representatives and marketing staff. Their daily work involves analyzing sales data and market trends using CRM systems (such as Salesforce or HubSpot), preparing reports and presentations in tools like Excel and PowerPoint, and attending meetings with clients, agency partners, and internal stakeholders. The work is predominantly **digital** – conducted through screens, email, video calls, and data platforms – but includes regular physical elements such as client meetings, trade events, and on-site team management.

name: Försäljnings- och marknadschefer, nivå 2
rationale: Sales and marketing managers perform substantial digital, analytical, and reporting work (CRM analysis, forecasting, KPI tracking) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, placing them in the high-moderate exposure range. However, the role's core value lies in strategic decision-making, relationship management, client negotiations, and leading teams — areas requiring human judgment and interpersonal presence that provide meaningful barriers to full AI displacement.
description: **Swedish Försäljnings- och marknadschefer (SSYK 1252)** primarily lead and coordinate sales and marketing teams, set commercial strategies, manage budgets, and follow up on sales targets and KPIs. Their daily work involves meetings with staff and clients, analyzing sales data and market trends using CRM systems (such as Salesforce or HubSpot), digital analytics tools, and Office-suite applications, alongside preparing reports and forecasts. The work is predominantly office-based and digital, though it also involves customer visits, negotiations, and occasional physical events or trade fairs.

name: IT-chefer, nivå 1
name_en: Information and communications technology service managers, level 1
rationale: IT managers at this senior level work almost entirely digitally — through meetings, project tracking tools, reporting, and strategic communication — making their work highly amenable to AI augmentation in areas like analysis, reporting, and decision support. However, the role's core value lies in organizational leadership, stakeholder management, and strategic judgment, which require human trust and accountability, limiting full automation and placing it in the 6-7 range rather than higher.
description: **IT-chefer, nivå 1 (SSYK 1311)** leder och samordnar verksamheten inom IT-avdelningar eller IT-företag på högre chefsnivå, med ansvar för strategiska beslut, budgetar och personalledning. Det dagliga arbetet är nästan uteslutande digitalt och innebär möten (ofta via Teams eller liknande), rapportering, uppföljning av projekt i verktyg som Jira eller liknande projektledningssystem, samt kommunikation med övriga ledningsgruppen. De arbetar sällan med tekniska system direkt utan fokuserar på styrning, resurssättning och att säkerställa att IT-leveranser möter verksamhetens mål.

name: IT-chefer, nivå 2
name_en: Information and communications technology service managers, level 2
rationale: IT service managers work almost entirely in digital environments using ITSM platforms, dashboards, and communication tools, making much of their analytical and reporting work highly susceptible to AI augmentation — AI can automate KPI monitoring, incident triage, capacity planning, and status reporting. However, the role's core value lies in stakeholder management, organizational judgment, escalation handling, and leading technical teams, which require human credibility and contextual decision-making that currently limits full AI displacement.
description:
## IT-chefer, nivå 2 (SSYK 1312)

These managers lead and coordinate IT service delivery within an organization, overseeing teams responsible for infrastructure, support, or system operations while ensuring that service levels, budgets, and staffing are managed effectively. Their daily work is almost entirely digital, involving tools such as ITSM platforms (e.g., ServiceNow, Jira), email, video conferencing, and reporting dashboards to monitor performance, handle escalations, and communicate with both technical staff and business stakeholders. They spend much of their time in meetings, reviewing KPIs and incident reports, planning capacity or projects, and acting as a bridge between technical teams and upper management or clients.

name: Forsknings- och utvecklingschefer, nivå 2
rationale: R&D managers work primarily digitally — reviewing reports, writing strategy, managing budgets, and coordinating projects — all tasks where AI can significantly augment productivity through automated analysis, document drafting, and decision-support tools. However, the role's core value lies in strategic judgment, leadership of technical teams, stakeholder negotiation, and organizational decision-making, which require human accountability and contextual expertise that currently resist full AI substitution.
description:
## Forsknings- och utvecklingschefer, nivå 2 (SSYK 1332)

These managers lead and coordinate research and development units within companies or public organizations, directing teams of researchers, engineers, or scientists toward defined innovation and product development goals. Their daily work involves planning R&D projects, allocating budgets and resources, reviewing technical reports and results, and communicating with senior management, clients, and external partners — work that is **primarily digital**, conducted through project management tools (e.g., Microsoft Project, Jira), office systems, and data analysis platforms. They spend considerable time in meetings, writing strategy documents, and making decisions about which projects to prioritize or terminate, while also staying updated on scientific and technological developments in their field.

name: Chefer inom bank, finans och försäkring, nivå 2
rationale: Financial and insurance managers at this level perform predominantly digital work involving KPI monitoring, budget tracking, regulatory compliance, and reporting — all tasks where AI can significantly augment or partially automate analysis, reporting, and decision support. However, the role retains meaningful human elements such as personnel management, stakeholder communication, judgment-based leadership, and accountability that create a natural barrier against full AI displacement.
description:
## Chefer inom bank, finans och försäkring, nivå 2 (SSYK 1612)

Dessa chefer leder och samordnar den operativa verksamheten inom exempelvis en bankavdelning, ett försäkringskontor eller en finansiell enhet – vilket innebär personalansvar, budgetuppföljning, målstyrning och kvalitetssäkring av processer. Det dagliga arbetet är **övervägande digitalt** och sker i affärssystem (t.ex. Temenos, SAP, interna CRM- och riskhanteringssystem), Excel, PowerPoint samt videokonferensverktyg för möten och rapportering uppåt i organisationen. De håller regelbundna teammöten, följer upp KPI:er och regulatoriska krav (

name: Civilingenjörsyrken inom bygg och anläggning
rationale: Civil engineers in construction work largely digitally through CAD, BIM, and calculation tools, making much of their output—structural analyses, technical drawings, and documentation—susceptible to AI augmentation or partial automation. However, the requirement for site visits, physical project oversight, client and contractor negotiations, and regulatory sign-off responsibilities tied to professional liability creates meaningful barriers that limit full AI displacement, keeping exposure moderate-to-high rather than extreme.
description: Swedish civil engineers within bygg och anläggning (SSYK 2142) primarily design, plan, and calculate structural and infrastructure projects such as buildings, bridges, roads, and water systems. Their daily work is largely digital, involving CAD software (such as AutoCAD, Revit, or Tekla Structures), calculation tools, and BIM (Building Information Modeling) platforms to produce technical drawings, structural analyses, and project documentation. They also spend time in meetings with clients, contractors, and project teams, and make periodic site visits to inspect that construction aligns with technical specifications.

name: Planeringsarkitekter m.fl.
rationale: The work is predominantly digital — producing planning documents, maps, GIS analyses, and illustrations using software like AutoCAD, ArcGIS, and Illustrator — making a large portion highly susceptible to AI augmentation or automation, particularly in drafting, spatial analysis, and report generation. However, meaningful barriers remain in the form of stakeholder negotiations, public consultations, site visits, political judgment, and regulatory interpretation, which require contextual human authority and trust that AI cannot fully replicate in the near term.
description: **Planeringsarkitekter m.fl.** arbetar främst med att ta fram detaljplaner, översiktsplaner och trafikplaneringsunderlag åt kommuner, länsstyrelser eller privata aktörer – ofta som en blandning av utredning, ritarbete och myndighetskontakt. Det dagliga arbetet är till övervägande del **digitalt**, där verktyg som AutoCAD, ArcGIS/QGIS, Revit och Adobe Illustrator används för att producera plankartor, illustrationer och analyser, kompletterat med dokumentskrivning i Office-miljö. Arbetet innefattar också fysiska inslag som platsbesök, samrådsmöten och presentationer för politiker, medborgare eller byggherrar.

name: Industridesigner
rationale: Industrial designers work heavily in digital environments (3D modeling, rendering, CAD software) where AI tools are rapidly automating visualization, generative design, and concept iteration, creating significant exposure. However, the role retains meaningful barriers through physical prototyping, hands-on user testing, cross-functional collaboration with engineers and manufacturers, and the embodied aesthetic judgment required to balance form, ergonomics, and manufacturability in ways AI cannot yet fully replicate.
description: En industridesigner i Sverige arbetar med att utveckla och formge produkter – allt från konsumentvaror och möbler till industriutrustning – med hänsyn till funktion, estetik, ergonomi och tillverkningsbarhet. Det dagliga arbetet är till stor del digitalt och inkluderar 3D-modellering i program som SolidWorks, Rhino eller Fusion 360, samt visualisering i renderingsprogram som KeyShot, men kombineras ofta med fysiska moment som att bygga prototyper, skissa för hand och genomföra användartester. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med ingenjörer, marknadsavdelningar och tillverkare för att säkerställa att designen går att producera inom givna kostnads- och materialramar.

name: Övriga läkare
rationale: These physicians work in non-clinical roles (occupational health, insurance medicine, pharmaceutical industry, regulatory work) that are heavily documentation-based, involving written assessments, certificates, and review of medical records — tasks where AI can significantly augment or partially automate output. However, medical judgment, legal accountability, and some physical examinations create barriers to full automation, placing this occupation higher than standard physicians but below purely administrative roles.
description: **Övriga läkare (SSYK 2219)** omfattar läkare inom specialiserade eller icke-standardiserade medicinska roller som inte passar in i de mer specifika SSYK-kategorierna, exempelvis inom företagshälsovård, försäkringsmedicin, läkemedelsindustri eller myndighetsarbete. I det dagliga arbetet utför de medicinska bedömningar, skriver utlåtanden och intyg, genomför hälsoundersökningar eller granskar medicinsk dokumentation – beroende på verksamhetsområde kan arbetet vara mer kontorsbaserat och administrativt än kliniskt. Arbetet är en mix av digitalt och fysiskt: de använder journalsystem (t.ex. Take Care, Cosmic), digitala ärendehanteringssystem

name: Professorer
rationale: Professors engage heavily in digital knowledge work — literature review, writing, data analysis, grant applications — where AI can significantly augment or partially automate output, and AI-assisted tools are already reshaping research workflows and academic writing. However, core professorial functions like mentoring doctoral students, designing original research programs, navigating institutional politics, and conducting hands-on laboratory work provide meaningful barriers to full AI displacement, keeping exposure moderate-to-high rather than extreme.
description: Swedish professors (SSYK 2311) primarily conduct independent research within their discipline, write and publish scientific articles, apply for research grants, and supervise doctoral students through their dissertations. They also teach at advanced university levels, hold lectures and seminars, and participate in examination and course development. The work is largely digital — involving literature databases (e.g., Web of Science, PubMed), statistical software (SPSS, R, MATLAB), word processors, and digital learning platforms — though laboratory-based fields also involve significant physical and hands-on work with instruments and equipment.

name: Forskarassistenter m.fl.
rationale: Research assistants perform a mix of highly AI-exposed tasks (literature reviews, data analysis, statistical modeling, academic writing) and more protected activities (lab work, physical experiments, fieldwork, mentoring students, and conference participation). AI tools like large language models and automated data analysis will significantly accelerate and partially automate the digital components, but the physical, experimental, and interpersonal dimensions of the role provide a meaningful barrier to full automation.
description: **Forskarassistenter m.fl. (SSYK 2313)** arbetar huvudsakligen med att planera och genomföra vetenskapliga studier och experiment inom sitt ämnesområde, analyserar data och skriver vetenskapliga artiklar och rapporter. Det dagliga arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och praktiskt arbete – beroende på disciplin kan det innebära laboratoriearbete med fysiska instrument och prover (t.ex. inom naturvetenskap eller medicin) eller primärt datorbaserat arbete med statistikprogram som R, SPSS eller Python, databaser och litteraturgranskningar. De handleder ofta doktorander och studenter, söker externa forskningsanslag och deltar i seminarier och konferenser som en central del av sin tjänst.

name: Åklagare
rationale: Prosecutors perform highly document-intensive, analytical work — reviewing evidence, writing indictments, and managing case files in digital systems — that is substantially automatable by AI for drafting, legal research, and evidence analysis. However, significant barriers remain in the form of courtroom advocacy requiring real-time oral argumentation and judgment calls, discretionary charging decisions with ethical and societal weight, and interpersonal interactions with victims, witnesses, and police that require human credibility and trust.
description: A Swedish åklagare leads preliminary investigations (förundersökningar) in collaboration with police, reviews evidence such as interrogation records, forensic reports, and surveillance data, and decides whether to press charges. Their daily work involves analyzing case files in digital systems like Cåbra (the prosecution authority's case management system), writing legal briefs and indictments, and appearing in court to present cases orally. The work is predominantly digital and document-intensive, combined with physical court appearances and meetings with police investigators, victims, and witnesses.

name: Bibliotekarier och arkivarier
rationale: Librarians and archivists have high exposure in their core information organization, cataloging, and research assistance tasks, which AI can increasingly automate through intelligent search, metadata generation, and digital classification systems. However, the occupation retains a meaningful physical component — handling historical documents, managing physical collections, and providing in-person user guidance — which moderates the overall exposure compared to fully digital knowledge work.
description: **Bibliotekarier och arkivarier** organiserar, katalogiserar och tillhandahåller tillgång till information och dokument – oavsett om det handlar om böcker, digitala resurser eller fysiska arkivhandlingar. De arbetar dagligen med system som bibliotekskataloger (t.ex. Libris/Sierra), ärendehanteringssystem och digitala arkivplattformar, men hanterar också fysiskt material som böcker, kartor och historiska dokument. Arbetet är i praktiken en blandning av digitalt och fysiskt – digitalisering av samlingar, rådgivning och informationssökning för användare, samt bevarande och förteckning av arkivmaterial.

name: Ingenjörer och tekniker inom industri, logistik och produktionsplanering
name_en: Industrial, logistics and production planning engineering technicians
rationale: This role is heavily digital and data-driven — analyzing production flows, ERP systems, scheduling, and supply chain coordination are all highly susceptible to AI augmentation or automation, placing it firmly in the upper-middle range. However, the regular physical presence on production floors and warehouses, cross-functional human coordination, and context-dependent judgment in dynamic manufacturing environments provide a meaningful barrier that prevents a higher score.
description: Swedish industrial, logistics and production planning engineering technicians (SSYK 3111) typically work with optimizing production flows, coordinating supply chains, and planning manufacturing schedules, often using tools like ERP systems (such as SAP or Monitor), CAD software, and spreadsheet-based planning tools. Their daily work involves analyzing production data, identifying bottlenecks, coordinating between departments, and following up on delivery times and inventory levels. The work is predominantly digital and office-based, though it regularly requires physical presence on the production floor or in warehouse environments to monitor operations and implement improvements.

name: Ingenjörer och tekniker inom maskinteknik
rationale: Mechanical engineering technicians perform significant computer-based work (CAD modeling, documentation, simulations, technical calculations) that is increasingly automatable by AI tools like generative design software and AI-assisted drafting. However, the substantial physical component—inspecting machinery, measuring components on the shop floor, troubleshooting real-world mechanical problems, and overseeing production—provides a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: Swedish mechanical engineering technicians (SSYK 3114) typically work with designing, calculating, and documenting mechanical components and systems using CAD software such as SolidWorks, AutoCAD, or CATIA, as well as performing technical calculations and preparing specifications and drawings for manufacturing or construction projects. Their work involves close collaboration with engineers and production staff, often reviewing prototypes, troubleshooting mechanical problems on the shop floor, and ensuring that designs meet technical standards and tolerances. The role is a mix of digital work (3D modeling, documentation, simulation) and physical work (inspecting machinery, measuring components, overseeing production processes).

name: Försäkringssäljare och försäkringsrådgivare
rationale: Insurance sales and advisory work is largely digital — conducted via CRM systems, quoting tools, phone, and video meetings — making it highly susceptible to AI that can analyze customer needs, generate tailored product recommendations, and automate administrative tasks like contract drafting and follow-ups. However, the role retains a meaningful human element through trust-based relationship selling, complex needs analysis, and regulatory compliance conversations that still benefit from personal rapport and nuanced judgment, keeping the score somewhat below the highest-exposure tier.
description: En försäkringssäljare och försäkringsrådgivare identifierar och kontaktar potentiella kunder, analyserar deras behov och rekommenderar lämpliga försäkringslösningar inom exempelvis liv-, sjuk- eller sakförsäkring. Det dagliga arbetet sker till stor del digitalt via CRM-system, offertsystem och digitala kommunikationsverktyg som telefon och videomöten, men innefattar även fysiska kundmöten. Arbetet kombinerar försäljning, rådgivning och administration – till exempel att upprätta avtal, följa upp befintliga kunder och hålla sig uppdaterad om produkter och regelverk.

name: Arbetsförmedlare
rationale: Employment officers do significant digital administrative work — documenting action plans, managing case records, using matching platforms — all of which AI can increasingly automate or augment, reducing the number of staff needed. However, the core of career guidance and employability assessment involves nuanced human judgment, motivational support, and trust-building with often vulnerable clients, providing a meaningful barrier to full automation.
description: An Arbetsförmedlare primarily works with matching job seekers to available positions, conducting individual meetings and career guidance conversations, and assessing clients' employability and need for support measures. They work extensively in digital systems such as Arbetsförmedlingen's own platforms (e.g., Arbetsförmedlingens verksamhetsstöd, Platsbanken) to register action plans, document case notes, and communicate with both job seekers and employers. The work is a mix of digital administration and direct human interaction, with most client contact happening through scheduled meetings — increasingly conducted via video or phone — alongside some physical office-based sessions.

name: Gruppledare för kontorspersonal
rationale: Office supervisors work primarily digitally with administrative coordination, scheduling, and communication tasks that AI can increasingly automate or augment — reducing the headcount needed for routine oversight. However, the role retains meaningful human elements such as team leadership, interpersonal conflict resolution, and real-time judgment calls about staffing and workloads that create a moderate barrier to full AI displacement.
description: A Swedish **gruppledare för kontorspersonal** primarily coordinates and supervises the day-to-day administrative work of an office team, assigning tasks, monitoring workloads, and ensuring routines and deadlines are met. They work mainly digitally, using tools such as email, scheduling systems, document management platforms (e.g., Office 365/SharePoint), and HR or business-specific administrative systems to track performance, handle staffing matters, and communicate with both staff and management. A smaller part of the role involves physical tasks like handling physical mail, filing, or walking the floor to support team members directly.

name: Fotografer
rationale: Photography has significant AI exposure in post-processing workflows (automated editing, background removal, AI upscaling, generative fill) and in some commercial/stock photography contexts where AI-generated images increasingly compete directly with commissioned photography. However, the physical capture work — managing lighting, directing subjects, being present at events, and building client relationships — provides a meaningful barrier that keeps exposure from reaching the highest levels seen in purely desk-based roles.
description: Swedish photographers (SSYK 3431) photograph people, objects, events, and environments for purposes such as advertising, journalism, portrait studios, or documentation, using digital cameras, lighting equipment, and various lenses as their primary tools. They work both on location and in studio settings, and a significant part of their daily work involves post-processing images in software such as Adobe Lightroom or Photoshop to adjust exposure, color, and composition. While the capture itself is a physical, hands-on activity, the workflow is predominantly digital — from memory cards and tethered shooting to digital delivery of final images to clients.

name: Drifttekniker, IT
rationale: Much of the digital work — ticket handling, user account management, monitoring alerts, scripting routine tasks, and documentation — is highly automatable by AI, and AIOps platforms are already handling anomaly detection and incident triage. However, the physical component (hands-on hardware work in server rooms, cabling, swapping drives) and the need for real-time contextual judgment in complex outages provides a meaningful barrier that keeps this role from scoring in the 8–9 range.
description: A Swedish IT-drifttekniker monitors, maintains, and troubleshoots an organization's IT infrastructure — including servers, networks, and client systems — to ensure stable and secure operations. Their daily work involves tasks like managing user accounts and permissions, handling incidents via ticket systems (such as ServiceNow or Jira), configuring network equipment, performing backups, and deploying software updates, often using tools like Active Directory, VMware, SCCM, and various monitoring platforms (e.g. Zabbix or Nagios). The work is a mix of digital and physical — most tasks are performed remotely through administrative interfaces and terminals, but the role also involves hands-on work with physical hardware such as servers, switches, and cabling in server rooms.

name: Kassapersonal m.fl.
rationale: Cashier work is already being heavily disrupted by self-checkout technology, automated payment systems, and fully cashierless stores (like Amazon Go), meaning AI and automation are directly reducing headcount in this role. While the job requires physical presence and some customer interaction, the core transactional tasks are highly automatable, placing this occupation at elevated risk even if full elimination is gradual due to infrastructure and social factors.
description: **Kassapersonal** hanterar betalningar och kundtransaktioner i butiker, bensinstationer eller liknande miljöer – de scannar varor med streckkodsläsare, tar emot betalning via kortterminaler, kontanter eller digitala betalningslösningar och ger tillbaka växel. Arbetet är en kombination av fysisk hantering (varor, kontanter, kvitton) och digitala verktyg (kassasystem/POS-system, ibland enkla lagermoduler), men sker primärt i ett fysiskt möte med kunden vid kassan. Utöver själva kassaarbetet ingår ofta enklare uppgifter som att packa varor, hantera returer, fylla på varor vid kassan och ibland besvara kundförfr

name: Processövervakare, kemisk industri
rationale: Chemical processing plant controllers work primarily at screens monitoring digital systems (DCS/SCADA), making a significant portion of their work susceptible to AI automation through predictive process control, anomaly detection, and autonomous parameter adjustment. However, the requirement for regular physical plant rounds, hands-on troubleshooting, sample collection, and safety-critical judgment in complex industrial environments creates meaningful barriers that prevent a higher exposure score.
description: En processövervakare inom kemisk industri övervakar och reglerar kemiska tillverkningsprocesser från ett kontrollrum, huvudsakligen via digitala styrsystem (DCS), SCADA-system och instrumentpaneler. Arbetet innebär att kontinuerligt läsa av mätdata för temperatur, tryck, flöden och kemiska sammansättningar, samt att justera parametrar och åtgärda larm för att hålla produktionen inom säkra och specificerade gränser. Arbetet är övervägande digitalt och stillasittande vid skärmar, men kompletteras av regelbundna fysiska rundor i anläggningen för att inspektera utrustning, ta prover och utföra enklare felsökning.

name: Croupierer och oddssättare m.fl.
rationale: Croupiers have a natural barrier from AI due to the physical, real-time, and social nature of managing casino tables — handling chips, cards, and maintaining player interaction — but bookmakers and odds-setters are highly exposed as their core work (statistical analysis, real-time odds calculation, and adjustment) is already heavily algorithmic and increasingly automated by AI systems. The occupation as a whole sits at a moderate-high exposure level, with the physical croupier role pulling the score down while the digital odds-setting component pushes it significantly upward.
description: **Croupierer och oddssättare m.fl.** arbetar med att leda och övervaka spel vid kasinobord – som roulette, blackjack och poker – eller med att sätta odds och ta emot vad på sporting och andra evenemang. De hanterar spelmarker, kort och rouletthjul fysiskt vid bordsspel, medan oddssättare i hög grad arbetar digitalt med specialiserade system för att beräkna och justera odds i realtid baserat på statistik och inflöde av insatser. Arbetet kräver noggrann kontroll av transaktioner, god räkneförmåga och vaksamhet mot fusk, och kombinerar således både fysiska moment vid spelbordet och digitala verktyg för administration och oddshantering.

name: General-, landstings- och kommundirektörer m.fl.
rationale: Senior government officials work primarily through digital and administrative channels — strategic planning, budgeting, reporting, and stakeholder communication — which are increasingly AI-augmentable tasks, placing them in moderate-to-high exposure territory. However, their roles are heavily anchored in political judgment, institutional trust, stakeholder negotiation, and accountability to elected bodies, which are high-context human functions that AI cannot readily substitute, limiting exposure compared to purely technical or data-processing roles.
description: Swedish **General-, landstings- och kommundirektörer m.fl.** lead and coordinate the operational work of government agencies, regions, or municipalities by translating political decisions into concrete plans, managing budgets, and directing senior staff. Their daily work involves meetings, strategic planning, written reporting, and stakeholder communication, primarily conducted through digital tools such as email, document management systems (e.g., W3D3 or Public 360), financial systems, and video conferencing. The work is overwhelmingly **digital and administrative** in nature, though it also includes physical meetings with politicians, union representatives, and the public.

name: Personal- och HR-chefer, nivå 1
rationale: HR managers work predominantly digitally and could see significant AI assistance in recruitment screening, compliance monitoring, policy drafting, and HR analytics, which raises exposure considerably. However, the role retains substantial human-judgment components — union negotiations, sensitive employee conversations, organizational leadership, and trust-based relationship management — that create meaningful barriers to full automation.
description: **Swedish Personal- och HR-chefer, nivå 1 (SSYK 1221)** plan, lead and coordinate an organization's HR functions, including recruitment, competence development, salary formation, labor law compliance and workplace environment work. Their daily work involves conducting meetings with managers and employees, handling employment contracts, salary reviews and policy documents, and managing HR systems such as Workday, Personec or Visma for personnel administration and reporting. The work is predominantly **digital and office-based**, combining strategic planning in computer-based tools with interpersonal tasks like negotiations, staff conversations and collaboration with union representatives.

name: Inköps-, logistik- och transportchefer, nivå 1
name_en: Supply, logistics and transport managers, level 1
rationale: Supply, logistics and transport managers work primarily digitally with ERP systems, data analysis, and procurement platforms, making a significant portion of their analytical and administrative tasks susceptible to AI automation or AI-driven productivity gains. However, their role involves substantial strategic leadership, supplier relationship management, staff oversight, and occasional physical operations oversight, which creates meaningful barriers to full AI displacement.
description: **Swedish Inköps-, logistik- och transportchefer (SSYK 1321)** lead and coordinate an organization's purchasing, logistics, and transport operations, overseeing supplier negotiations, inventory planning, and distribution chains. Their daily work is primarily digital, involving ERP systems (such as SAP or Dynamics 365), procurement platforms, and data analysis tools to monitor costs, contracts, delivery performance, and supply chain flows. They spend significant time in meetings, managing staff, setting strategies, and handling supplier relationships, with occasional physical oversight of warehouse or transport operations.

name: Inköps-, logistik- och transportchefer, nivå 2
name_en: Supply, logistics and transport managers, level 2
rationale: Supply, logistics and transport managers work primarily through digital systems (ERP, TMS, procurement platforms) where AI can substantially augment tasks like demand forecasting, supplier analysis, contract review, and inventory optimization — reducing the headcount needed for analytical and coordination work. However, the role retains significant human elements including leadership, supplier relationship management, physical site oversight, and complex negotiation, which creates a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: **Swedish Inköps-, logistik- och transportchefer (SSYK 1322)** plan, coordinate and oversee an organization's purchasing, warehousing, distribution and transport operations, managing supplier relationships, contract negotiations and cost optimization. Their daily work involves leading teams, setting procurement strategies, monitoring inventory levels and ensuring deliveries meet quality and deadline requirements. The work is primarily digital – using ERP systems (such as SAP or Dynamics), procurement platforms, transport management systems (TMS) and data dashboards – though it also includes physical site visits to warehouses and meetings with suppliers and carriers.

name: Forsknings- och utvecklingschefer, nivå 1
rationale: R&D managers work primarily digitally with strategic planning, reporting, and coordination tasks that AI can increasingly assist with — drafting reports, analyzing project portfolios, and optimizing resource allocation — making productivity gains significant. However, the role requires high-level strategic judgment, stakeholder relationship management, and leadership in ambiguous innovation contexts that still resist full automation, keeping exposure moderate rather than high.
description:
## Forsknings- och utvecklingschefer, nivå 1 (SSYK 1331)

These managers lead and coordinate research and development departments within companies or public organizations, setting strategic direction for R&D projects, allocating budgets and resources, and ensuring that research goals align with the organization's overall objectives. Their daily work involves meetings with project leaders and researchers, reviewing progress reports, making decisions about priorities, and communicating with senior management or external partners such as universities or funding bodies. The work is primarily digital — using tools like project management software (e.g., MS Project, Jira), ERP systems, presentation tools, and email — though it may also involve physical site visits to laboratories or production facilities depending on the industry.

name: Chefer inom arkitekt- och ingenjörsverksamhet, nivå 1
rationale: These senior managers operate largely in a digital, office-based environment using tools like ERP systems and video conferencing, making much of their analytical and communication work susceptible to AI augmentation — particularly financial reporting, strategic analysis, and project monitoring. However, the role's core value lies in high-stakes executive judgment, client trust relationships, personnel leadership, and cross-functional coordination, which remain difficult for AI to fully replicate, anchoring the exposure in the mid-to-upper range rather than the high end.
description:
## Chefer inom arkitekt- och ingenjörsverksamhet, nivå 1 (SSYK 1341)

These are senior managers (typically CEOs, managing directors, or division heads) at architectural, engineering, or technical consultancy firms, whose primary work involves setting strategic direction, managing budgets and business development, and overseeing multiple departments or project portfolios rather than hands-on technical work. Their daily tasks center on executive decisions, client negotiations, financial reporting, and personnel responsibility, conducted largely through digital tools such as ERP systems, project management dashboards, email, and video conferencing. The work is predominantly digital and office-based, with physical site visits or client meetings occurring occasionally but not as a core daily activity.

name: Geologer och geofysiker m.fl.
rationale: Geologists and geophysicists combine significant fieldwork (drilling, sampling, geophysical measurements) that requires physical presence with substantial office-based work in GIS, modeling, and data analysis that is highly amenable to AI automation. AI can increasingly handle data interpretation, seismic analysis, and geological modeling, but the irreplaceable need for field data collection, physical site assessment, and expert judgment in complex subsurface interpretation keeps exposure at a moderate-high level.
description:
## Geologer och geofysiker m.fl. (SSYK 2114)

Dessa yrkesverksamma kartlägger och analyserar jordens uppbyggnad, berggrund, mineral- och resurstillgångar samt geologiska processer genom fältarbete, provtagning och laboratorieanalyser. Arbetet kombinerar fysiskt fältarbete – såsom borrning, insamling av berg- och jordprover samt geofysiska mätningar med instrument som seismografer, georadar och gravimetrar – med omfattande digitalt arbete i GIS-program (exempelvis ArcGIS), modelleringsprogram och dataanalysverktyg. Resultaten används ofta som beslutsunderlag för gruvindustri, samhällsplanering, miljöutredningar eller klimat- och grundvattenf

name: Farmakologer och biomedicinare
rationale: Pharmacologists and biomedical scientists have a dual nature — the physical laboratory work (cell cultures, assays, animal models, equipment operation) provides a natural barrier to full AI automation, but the significant computational and analytical components (data analysis, bioinformatics, statistical modeling, regulatory documentation) are highly AI-exposed. AI tools are already transforming drug discovery, literature review, and data interpretation, reducing the headcount needed for data-heavy roles, while bench work remains more protected — yielding a moderately high but not extreme exposure score.
description:
## Farmakologer och biomedicinare (SSYK 2133)

These professionals conduct laboratory-based research and analysis, studying how drugs and biological substances interact with living organisms — working hands-on with cell cultures, animal models, tissue samples, and biochemical assays using equipment such as microscopes, spectrophotometers, PCR machines, and liquid handling systems. A significant part of their daily work involves designing experiments, collecting and analyzing biological data, and interpreting results using statistical software and bioinformatics tools. Their work is therefore **a mix of physical laboratory work and digital analysis**, with the balance depending on their role — bench scientists lean heavily physical, while those in regulatory affairs, pharmacovigilance, or data-focused roles work primarily digitally.

name: Civilingenjörsyrken inom kemi och kemiteknik
rationale: Chemical engineering professionals combine significant computational and simulation work (process modeling, calculations, documentation) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with essential physical plant work including sampling, troubleshooting, and on-site operations that require presence in industrial facilities. AI tools can enhance productivity in design optimization, process simulation, and documentation, but the hands-on plant monitoring, safety oversight, and real-world process debugging create meaningful barriers to full AI displacement.
description: Swedish civilingenjörer inom kemi och kemiteknik arbetar med att utveckla, optimera och övervaka kemiska processer och produktionsanläggningar, till exempel inom läkemedelsindustrin, pappersbruk, raffinaderier eller materialtillverkning. De använder processimuleringsprogram (som Aspen Plus eller MATLAB), laboratorieanalysutrustning och styrsystem (DCS/SCADA) för att analysera reaktioner, dimensionera utrustning och säkerställa produktkvalitet och säkerhet. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt arbete (beräkningar, simuleringar, dokumentation) och fysiskt arbete ute i anläggningar för provtagning, felsökning och driftsuppföljning.

name: Övriga civilingenjörsyrken
rationale: This catch-all engineering category involves largely digital, analytical work — standards development, risk assessments, compliance documentation, and system analysis — that AI can significantly augment or partially automate, similar to other engineering roles. However, the frequent need for site inspections, hands-on facility assessments, and cross-functional coordination with physical systems creates meaningful barriers to full AI displacement, keeping the score in the mid-range alongside other engineering professionals.
description: **Swedish Övriga civilingenjörsyrken (SSYK 2149)** covers engineers who don't fit neatly into standard specializations — such as those working in quality engineering, safety systems, environmental technology, or industrial management. Their daily work typically involves analyzing technical systems, developing standards and specifications, conducting risk or compliance assessments, and coordinating between design, production, and regulatory requirements. The work is largely digital, using tools like CAD software, data analysis platforms, spreadsheets, and technical documentation systems, though site inspections and hands-on facility assessments are also common depending on the industry.

name: Övriga designer och formgivare
rationale: Fashion and product designers face significant AI exposure in the conceptual and visualization phases — generative AI tools (Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, parametric design AI) can rapidly produce design variations, mood boards, and digital prototypes, reducing the labor needed for ideation. However, the hands-on physical work involving material testing, prototype fabrication, supplier visits, and tactile craft judgment creates a meaningful barrier that keeps exposure from reaching the highest levels.
description: **Övriga designer och formgivare (SSYK 2179)** arbetar med att formge och utveckla produkter, miljöer eller visuella koncept inom områden som möbeldesign, inredningsdesign, textildesign eller industridesign. I det dagliga arbetet ritar och visualiserar de idéer – både för hand och digitalt med program som Adobe Creative Suite, AutoCAD, Rhino eller SketchUp – och tar fram prototyper eller materialprover för att testa hur ett koncept fungerar i praktiken. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och fysiskt: konceptfasen sker ofta framför skärmen medan materialprovning, kundmöten och produktionsnära arbete kräver hands-on-arbete i verkstad eller ute hos leverantörer.

name: Universitets- och högskolelektorer
rationale: University lecturers face significant AI exposure in research tasks (literature reviews, writing, grading, course preparation) and administrative duties, but physical presence requirements for on-campus teaching, lab supervision, and real-time student mentoring provide a meaningful barrier. The deeply relational and evaluative aspects of academic work — including thesis supervision, nuanced assessment, and intellectual guidance — still require human judgment, though AI will substantially reduce the labor needed for many supporting tasks.
description: Swedish university and higher education lecturers primarily teach, supervise students, and conduct research within their academic discipline, splitting their time between classroom instruction, digital learning platforms (such as Canvas or Blackboard), and writing and publishing academic work. Their daily tasks include preparing and delivering lectures (increasingly in hybrid or online formats), grading assignments, supervising bachelor's and master's theses, and participating in departmental meetings and administrative duties. The work is a mix of digital and physical — digital tools dominate for communication, course administration, and research (databases, reference managers like Zotero, statistical software), while physical presence is required for on-campus teaching, lab work, and student supervision.

name: Museiintendenter m.fl.
rationale: Museum curators have significant exposure to AI in research, cataloguing, provenance investigation, and writing tasks — areas where AI tools can dramatically accelerate work and reduce staffing needs. However, the physical handling and assessment of artifacts, exhibition design requiring contextual judgment, and community/institutional collaboration provide meaningful barriers to full automation.
description: Swedish museum curators (**Museiintendenter m.fl.**) primarily work with collecting, cataloguing, preserving, and interpreting cultural or natural heritage objects and collections, including researching provenance and writing scientific documentation. Their daily work combines both physical and digital tasks — handling and assessing physical artifacts, conducting archival research, and increasingly using digital collection management systems (such as KulturNav, Carlotta, or MuseumPlus) to register and make collections accessible online. They also develop exhibitions, write texts for the public and academic audiences, and collaborate with educators, conservators, and other institutions.

name: Musiker, sångare och kompositörer
rationale: AI tools are significantly reshaping composition, production, and arrangement workflows — generative music AI can now draft backing tracks, harmonies, and full compositions — reducing demand for session musicians and certain compositional work. However, live performance, the irreplaceable human emotional connection of a singer or instrumentalist, and the cultural value placed on human artistry provide a meaningful barrier against full automation.
description: **Musiker, sångare och kompositörer** framför musik live eller i inspelningsstudio, spelar instrument eller sjunger, och skapar och arrangerar musikstycken. De arbetar med både fysiska verktyg – instrument som gitarr, piano eller violin – och digitala verktyg som DAW-program (exempelvis Ableton Live, Logic Pro eller Pro Tools) för inspelning, redigering och produktion. Arbetet är en kombination av fysiskt och digitalt: liveframträdanden och övning är utpräglat fysiska, medan komposition och produktion i allt högre grad sker digitalt.

name: Flygledare
rationale: Air traffic control is almost entirely screen-based and data-driven, making it technically amenable to AI augmentation — AI can already assist with conflict detection, separation management, and routing optimization, reducing cognitive load and potentially the number of controllers needed. However, full automation faces enormous regulatory, safety, and liability barriers, and the real-time, high-stakes decision-making in dynamic, ambiguous situations (weather, emergencies, pilot deviations) requires human accountability that will resist full displacement for the foreseeable future.
description: En flygledare övervakar och dirigerar lufttrafik inom ett angivet luftrum eller på en flygplats genom att ge instruktioner till piloter via radio om höjd, kurs, hastighet och start- och landningstillstånd. Arbetet sker nästan uteslutande digitalt och är starkt beroende av radarskärmar, kommunikationssystem och digitala flygplansdata (t.ex. höjd, hastighet och identifiering via transpondrar), samt koordineringsverktyg för att hålla säkra separationer mellan flygplan. Arbetet är mentalt krävande och kräver konstant uppmärksamhet, snabbt beslutsfattande och tät kommunikation med både piloter och kollegor – det fysiska inslaget är minimalt och består i huvudsak

name: Inredare, dekoratörer och scenografer m.fl.
rationale: AI tools are increasingly capable of generating mood boards, visualizations, space planning layouts, and material recommendations, significantly augmenting or replacing portions of the design process that were previously time-intensive. However, the physical, on-location components — overseeing installations, hands-on styling, client relationship management, and tactile material selection — provide a meaningful barrier to full automation, keeping exposure moderate-to-high rather than severe.
description: Swedish **Inredare, dekoratörer och scenografer** plan and design interior spaces, stage sets, or decorative environments by selecting furniture, materials, colors, lighting, and props to achieve a desired aesthetic or functional result. Their daily work involves a mix of client consultations, sketching and producing mood boards or technical drawings, and sourcing products from suppliers — using tools like AutoCAD, SketchUp, Adobe Creative Suite, or visualization software alongside physical material samples and catalogs. The work is **hybrid** in nature: digital tools handle planning and presentation, but much of the job involves hands-on work on location — arranging, styling, and overseeing the physical realization of a space or set.

name: Supporttekniker, IT
rationale: IT support technicians face significant AI exposure in their remote/digital work — AI tools and chatbots are already automating Tier 1 ticket resolution, password resets, and guided troubleshooting, while AI copilots boost productivity for more complex cases. However, the regular hands-on physical component (hardware installation, on-site troubleshooting, physical device handling) provides a meaningful barrier that prevents a higher score.
description: En supporttekniker inom IT arbetar huvudsakligen med att felsöka och lösa tekniska problem åt användare, både via telefon, e-post och ärendehanteringssystem (som Jira, ServiceNow eller TOPdesk) och på plats. De installerar, konfigurerar och underhåller hård- och mjukvara – exempelvis datorer, skrivare, operativsystem och standardprogram som Microsoft 365 – samt hanterar användarkonton i system som Active Directory eller Azure AD. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och fysiskt, där fjärrsupport via verktyg som TeamViewer eller Remote Desktop utgör en stor del, men där hands-on-arbete med fysisk utrustning också förekommer regelbundet.

name: Nätverks- och systemtekniker m.fl.
rationale: Network and systems technicians have significant AI exposure in areas like network monitoring, diagnostics, configuration automation, and incident management, where AI tools are rapidly reducing manual effort. However, the physical components of the role — cabling, hardware installation, rack mounting, and on-site troubleshooting — provide a meaningful barrier to full automation, keeping the score in the mid-range.
description: En nätverks- och systemtekniker installerar, konfigurerar och felsöker nätverksutrustning som switchar, routrar och brandväggar, samt hanterar servrar och IT-infrastruktur både på plats och på distans. Det dagliga arbetet är en kombination av fysiskt arbete – som att dra kablar, montera hårdvara i serverrum och byta defekta komponenter – och digitalt arbete via verktyg som nätverksövervakningssystem (t.ex. Nagios, PRTG), fjärrhanteringsverktyg och kommandoradsgränssnitt (CLI). De arbetar även med dokumentation, incidenthantering och säkerhetsuppdateringar för att hålla organisationens IT-miljö stabil och säker.

name: Inkasserare och pantlånare m.fl.
rationale: Debt collection work is heavily digital — managing cases in software, sending automated communications, filing legal claims — making it moderately exposed to AI automation that can handle routine follow-ups, payment plan negotiations, and document processing. However, pawnbroking requires physical appraisal of items, in-person customer interaction, and hands-on handling of goods, which creates a natural barrier that pulls the overall score down from the higher range typical of pure office roles.
description: En inkasserare kontaktar gäldenärer via telefon, brev och digitala system för att driva in obetalda skulder, upprättar betalningsplaner och hanterar rättsliga åtgärder som betalningsförelägganden via Kronofogden. En pantlånare tar emot fysiska föremål som säkerhet för kortfristiga lån, värderar dessa (smycken, elektronik, instrument) och hanterar lagring samt eventuell försäljning om lånet inte återbetalas. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt (inkassosystem, ärendehanteringsprogram, kommunikation via e-post) och fysiskt arbete, där pantlånaren i synnerhet arbetar hands-on med föremål i butiksmiljö medan ink

name: Biblioteks- och arkivassistenter m.fl.
rationale: Library and filing clerks perform significant digital administrative tasks — cataloging, registration, and information retrieval — that AI can increasingly automate, and AI-powered search systems reduce the need for human intermediaries in locating information. However, the substantial physical component of the role (shelving, handling physical collections, in-person patron assistance) provides a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement, placing it in the mid-to-upper range rather than the high end.
description: Swedish **biblioteks- och arkivassistenter** arbetar främst med att registrera, katalogisera och organisera böcker, dokument och andra informationsbärare, samt hjälpa besökare att hitta och låna material. De använder bibliotekssystem som Libris/XL eller kommunala katalogverktyg för digital registrering, men hanterar också fysiskt material – sorterar hyllor, plockar fram beställningar och sköter in- och utlåning i disk. Arbetet är en blandning av digitalt och fysiskt: administrativa uppgifter sköts i dator, men en stor del av dagen innebär rörelse i lokalerna och direkt hantering av fysiska samlingar eller arkivhandlingar.

name: Övriga administrations- och servicechefer, nivå 1
name_en: Administration and service managers not elsewhere classified, level 1
rationale: This role involves significant digital administrative work (scheduling, budgeting, reporting via ERP systems and Office tools) that AI can increasingly handle, but the job also requires physical presence for facility rounds, direct staff management, and hands-on coordination with vendors and personnel. The managerial and interpersonal oversight components, combined with the varied physical service coordination responsibilities, provide a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement, placing it in the mid-range of exposure.
description: **Övriga administrations- och servicechefer, nivå 1 (SSYK 1291)** leder och samordnar administrativa och servicerelaterade funktioner inom en organisation som inte faller under mer specifika chefskategorier – exempelvis chefer för reception, lokalvård, posthantering eller interna serviceavdelningar. Det dagliga arbetet innebär personalansvar, schemaläggning, budgetuppföljning och verksamhetsplanering, och utförs till stor del via digitala verktyg som ärendehanteringssystem, ekonomisystem (t.ex. SAP eller Agresso) och Officepaketet, men inkluderar även fysiska moment som ronder i verksamhetslokaler och direkta möten med personal och leverantörer. Arbetet är därmed en mix av digitalt administrat

name: Övriga administrations- och servicechefer, nivå 2
name_en: Administration and service managers not elsewhere classified, level 2
rationale: This role combines significant screen-based administrative work (scheduling, budgeting, HR systems, reporting) that is highly automatable with physical oversight, supplier coordination, and on-site staff management that requires presence and interpersonal judgment. AI can substantially assist with the administrative half of the role and reduce the need for support staff, but the hands-on coordination, physical inspection, and managerial accountability components create a meaningful barrier to full automation.
description:
**Swedish Övriga administrations- och servicechefer, nivå 2 (SSYK 1292)**

These managers oversee administrative or support service functions that don't fit neatly into other managerial categories — such as facility management, office administration, reception services, or internal logistics — planning and coordinating staff, budgets, and operational routines within their unit. Their daily work involves a mix of digital tools (email, scheduling systems, HR and financial management software, document management platforms) and physical oversight (inspecting premises, coordinating suppliers, handling practical service issues). The role is roughly equally split between screen-based administrative work and hands-on coordination with staff and service providers on site.

name: Chefer inom arkitekt- och ingenjörsverksamhet, nivå 2
rationale: Architectural and engineering managers perform substantial digital work including project planning, budgeting, reporting, and coordination that AI can increasingly augment or partially automate, pushing exposure moderately high. However, the role's core value lies in leadership, stakeholder management, site visits, real-time decision-making under uncertainty, and bridging technical specialists with clients and executives — human judgment-intensive functions that create meaningful resistance to full AI displacement.
description: En chef inom arkitekt- och ingenjörsverksamhet på nivå 2 leder och samordnar tekniska projekt och avdelningar inom exempelvis bygg, infrastruktur eller produktutveckling, och ansvarar för personalplanering, budgetar och kvalitetssäkring. Det dagliga arbetet är till stor del digitalt och innefattar projektledningsverktyg (som MS Project eller Primavera), CAD-system, ekonomisystem och kommunikationsplattformar, men kombineras med fysiska möten, byggplatsbesök och granskning av ritningar och tekniska underlag. De fungerar som en brygga mellan beställare, tekniska specialister och ledning, och ägnar mycket tid åt rapportering, beslutsfattande och att lösa resurskonflikter eller tekniska problem.

name: Fastighets- och förvaltningschefer, nivå 1
name_en: Real estate and head of administration managers, level 1
rationale: This role involves significant digital/administrative work (budgeting, reporting, contract management, tenant communications) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, but it also requires physical site inspections, relationship management with tenants and contractors, and operational judgment that grounds exposure. The strategic leadership component and blend of on-site presence with digital work places it in the mid-range, somewhat above typical management roles due to the heavy administrative and financial documentation workload.
description: **Fastighets- och förvaltningschef, nivå 1** leder och samordnar förvaltningen av fastighetsbestånd genom att planera underhåll, hantera hyresgästrelationer, budgetar och upphandling av tjänster. Det dagliga arbetet sker till stor del digitalt via fastighetsförvaltningssystem (som Vitec eller Raindance), ekonomisystem och e-post, kombinerat med fysiska platsbesök för att inspektera fastigheter och möten med entreprenörer, hyresgäster och ägare. Rollen är strategisk och administrativ till sin natur men kräver också löpande operativt ansvar för att säkerställa att drift, underhåll och ekonomi fungerar enligt plan.

name: Avdelningschefer inom grund- och gymnasieskola samt vuxenutbildning, nivå 1
name_en: Primary and secondary schools and adult education managers, level 1
rationale: This role involves substantial office-based administrative work — budgeting, scheduling, compliance reporting, and staff coordination — that AI can increasingly assist with or automate, pushing exposure upward. However, the job's core value lies in on-site leadership, managing interpersonal conflicts, maintaining trust with staff, students, and parents, and exercising contextual judgment in a human-facing institutional setting, which creates meaningful barriers to full AI displacement.
description:
## Avdelningschefer inom grund- och gymnasieskola samt vuxenutbildning (SSYK 1411)

These managers primarily oversee the operational and administrative running of schools or adult education units, including staffing decisions, budget management, and ensuring compliance with the Swedish Education Act (*skollagen*). Their daily work involves leading staff meetings, handling personnel matters, coordinating with teachers and support staff, and reporting to municipal or principal-level management, using tools such as school administration systems (e.g., Skola24, Procapita/Personec), email, and digital meeting platforms like Teams. The work is predominantly **office-based and digital**, though it includes regular physical presence on-site to manage the work environment, handle conflicts, and maintain contact with students, parents, and staff.

name: Övriga avdelningschefer inom utbildning, nivå 1
name_en: Department managers in education not elsewhere classified, level 1
rationale: This role combines significant digital-administrative work (scheduling, budget follow-up, document management, compliance reporting) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with substantial in-person leadership responsibilities like staff supervision, conflict resolution, and stakeholder meetings that resist full automation. The managerial and relational dimensions — motivating teachers, navigating institutional politics, and exercising contextual judgment — create a meaningful barrier to AI displacement, placing it in the mid-range of exposure.
description:
## Övriga avdelningschefer inom utbildning, nivå 1 (SSYK 1491)

These managers oversee and coordinate educational operations at a departmental level within schools, adult education centers, or similar institutions, handling tasks such as staff scheduling, budget follow-up, and ensuring that educational activities meet regulatory requirements. Their daily work involves meetings with teachers and other staff, handling administrative matters in systems like Extens, W3D3, or municipal planning tools, and communicating with school leadership, municipalities, and external stakeholders. The work is **primarily digital** (email, administrative platforms, document management) but combined with significant in-person leadership responsibilities such as staff supervision, workplace rounds, and parent or student meetings.

name: Övriga verksamhetschefer inom utbildning, nivå 2
name_en: Operations managers in education not elsewhere classified, level 2
rationale: This education operations manager role is heavily administrative and communicative — involving budgeting, strategic planning, and digital system work that AI can increasingly assist with or automate — but the role also requires significant physical presence, personnel management, stakeholder relations, and contextual leadership judgment that provide meaningful barriers to full AI displacement. The mix of digital-administrative tasks (high exposure) with interpersonal, organizational, and on-site responsibilities (lower exposure) places it in the mid-range, slightly above typical manager scores due to the strong administrative component.
description: En övrig verksamhetschef inom utbildning på nivå 2 ansvarar för att leda och samordna verksamheten inom exempelvis folkhögskolor, studieförbund, yrkesutbildningar eller liknande utbildningsorganisationer som inte klassificeras under mer specifika chefskategorier – detta innefattar personalansvar, budgetarbete och strategisk planering. Det dagliga arbetet sker primärt digitalt via administrativa system (exempelvis verksamhets- och ekonomisystem som Raindance eller Agresso), e-post, Teams/Zoom för möten samt dokumenthantering i Office-miljö, men kombineras med fysiska inslag som personalmöten, klassrumsbesök och kontakter med externa aktörer. Rollen är övervägande administrativ och kommunikativ snar

name: Avdelnings- och enhetschefer inom hälsa och sjukvård, nivå 2
name_en: Department and unit managers in health care, level 2
rationale: Healthcare department managers blend significant digital administrative work (scheduling, budgeting, HR systems, quality reporting) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with essential physical presence requirements including ward rounds, direct staff supervision, and real-time crisis management. The leadership, interpersonal, and contextual judgment components tied to physical healthcare environments provide a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement, placing this role in the mid-range of exposure.
description: **Avdelnings- och enhetschefer inom hälsa och sjukvård, nivå 2** ansvarar för den operativa ledningen av en vård- eller omsorgsavdelning, vilket inkluderar personalplanering, schemaläggning, budgetuppföljning och kvalitetssäkring av vården. De arbetar dagligen i digitala system som journalsystem (t.ex. Take Care, Cosmic eller NCS Cross), HR-system och ekonomirapporteringsverktyg, kombinerat med fysisk närvaro på avdelningen för möten, ronddeltagande och direkt medarbetarkontakt. Arbetet är en blandning av digitalt administrativt arbete och fysisk verksamhetsnärvaro, där kommunikation med både personal, patienter och överordnad ledning utgör en

name: Chefer inom bank, finans och försäkring, nivå 1
rationale: While the work is almost entirely digital and cognitive — making it technically amenable to AI — top-level executive roles are heavily anchored in trust, relationships, accountability, political judgment, and board-level authority that AI cannot substitute. AI will significantly augment these managers (automating reporting, analysis, scenario modeling) and may reduce the number of middle layers beneath them, but the strategic leadership and stakeholder relationship functions at the top create a meaningful barrier to direct displacement.
description:
## Chefer inom bank, finans och försäkring, nivå 1 (SSYK 1611)

These are **top-level managers** (e.g. CEOs, division heads) within banks, insurance companies, or financial institutions, whose primary work involves setting strategic direction, overseeing organizational performance, and making high-level decisions on risk, capital allocation, and business development. Their daily work consists largely of **meetings, negotiations, and decision-making** – reviewing financial reports and KPIs, steering leadership teams, engaging with boards, regulators, and major clients, and managing organizational change. The work is **almost entirely digital and cognitive** in nature, relying on tools such as management dashboards, financial reporting systems (e.g. SAP, Bloomberg terminals at a supervisory level), email, video conferencing, and presentation software, with little to no physical or manual component.

name: Cell- och molekylärbiologer m.fl.
name_en: Cell and molecular biologists and related professionals
rationale: Cell and molecular biologists have significant AI exposure in their computational work — data analysis, bioinformatics, literature review, and experimental design can all be substantially augmented or automated by AI tools. However, the core hands-on bench work (cell culturing, pipetting, running PCR, microscopy) requires physical laboratory presence and manual dexterity, which creates a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: Swedish cell and molecular biologists typically work in laboratory settings conducting experiments such as cell culturing, gene expression analysis, protein studies, and microscopy, using physical tools like pipettes, centrifuges, PCR machines, flow cytometers, and various biochemical reagents. Their work is a combination of hands-on bench work in the lab and digital analysis, where they process and interpret experimental data using bioinformatics software, statistical tools, and databases.
