Documentation, literature review, and reporting are also significant parts of the role, meaning the work spans both physical laboratory practice and computer-based analysis.

name: Växt- och djurbiologer
rationale: Plant and animal biologists have significant AI exposure in their analytical and reporting tasks — AI tools are rapidly advancing in species identification, genomic analysis, GIS mapping, statistical modeling, and literature review — but the essential fieldwork component (physical specimen collection, habitat surveying, setting traps, field navigation) creates a meaningful barrier to full automation. The hybrid nature of the role, roughly split between outdoor physical work and digital analysis, places it in a moderate-to-high exposure range, with the computational/data side highly exposed but the field presence requirements keeping the overall score below the high-exposure tier.
description: Swedish plant and animal biologists (växt- och djurbiologer) primarily conduct fieldwork and laboratory investigations, collecting specimens, surveying species populations, and mapping habitats in forests, wetlands, or marine environments using tools like sampling nets, traps, GPS devices, and microscopes. In the lab, they analyze biological material using techniques such as DNA sequencing, chemical analysis, and microscopy, and they document and process results using specialized software (e.g., GIS systems, statistical tools like R). Their work is a clear mix of physical fieldwork and digital analysis, with reporting, literature review, and data management also forming a significant part of daily tasks.

name: Specialister och rådgivare inom skogsbruk
rationale: Forestry specialists blend substantial physical fieldwork in varied terrain with digital planning and advisory tasks, giving them a natural barrier against full automation — the field assessment component requires real-world navigation, sensory judgment, and local ecological knowledge that AI cannot yet replicate. However, the office-bound portions (GIS analysis, silvicultural planning in Heureka/PCSkog, report writing, landowner advice) are increasingly AI-augmentable, and AI-driven remote sensing, LiDAR analysis, and predictive forest modeling are rapidly reducing the need for manual field inventories, pushing overall exposure into the moderate range.
description: Swedish forestry specialists and advisors (**SSYK 2135**) primarily work with planning, assessment, and management of forest resources – conducting field inventories, producing silvicultural plans, and advising landowners or companies on harvesting, regeneration, and nature conservation measures. Their work combines significant physical fieldwork (walking forest terrain, using clinometers, relascopes, GPS devices, and forest inventory apps on tablets or ruggedized handhelds) with office-based digital work in GIS software, forest management systems like **Heureka** or **PCSkog**, and report writing. The balance between field and desk varies by role, but most professionals move regularly between the two, with digital tools increasingly central even during field assessments.

name: Civilingenjörsyrken inom gruvteknik och metallurgi
name_en: Engineering professionals in mining-, metallurgy technology and related professionals
rationale: Mining and metallurgy engineers use specialized software for geological modeling, process simulation, and data analysis that AI can increasingly automate or augment, raising exposure for the office-based portions of their work. However, the role requires regular physical inspections of mines, processing plants, and smelters in demanding industrial environments, along with domain-specific judgment about safety and operational conditions, which creates a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: **Civilingenjör inom gruvteknik och metallurgi** arbetar med att planera, optimera och övervaka utvinning av malm och mineraler samt förädlingsprocesser som smältning, anrikning och metallframställning. I det dagliga arbetet används specialiserad programvara för geologisk modellering och gruvplanering (exempelvis Datamine, Surpac eller AutoCAD), processimulering och dataanalys, men arbetet innefattar också regelbundna fysiska inspektioner av gruvor, anrikningsverk och smältverk. Arbetet är därmed en kombination av digitalt kontorsarbete – analys, rapportskrivning och simulering – och praktiskt fältarbete i industriella och ofta krävande fysiska miljöer.

name: Lantmätare
rationale: Lantmätare work is roughly split between fieldwork (physical measurements, GPS, drones, site visits) that resists automation and office-based GIS processing, legal documentation, and cadastral administration that is increasingly AI-augmentable. The strong legal-administrative dimension and official cadastral authority role adds human accountability requirements, but AI tools are rapidly improving at spatial data processing, boundary analysis, and document generation, moderating the overall exposure to a mid-range score.
description: A Swedish Lantmätare works with measuring, mapping, and legally defining land boundaries, property divisions (*fastighetsbildning*), and geographic data, often handling official cadastral processes such as splitting or merging property parcels. Their work combines physical fieldwork using GPS equipment, total stations, and drones with extensive digital work in GIS software (such as AutoCAD, ArcGIS, or Trimble solutions) and legal-administrative systems like Lantmäteriet's own databases. The role is roughly half-and-half between office-based digital processing and documentation and outdoor measurement assignments, with a strong legal and administrative dimension that distinguishes it from pure technical surveying.

name: Specialister inom miljöskydd och miljöteknik
rationale: Environmental protection professionals combine substantial field work (site inspections, sample collection, emissions measurement) that resists full automation with significant digital tasks (GIS analysis, environmental modeling, report writing, permit review) that are highly AI-amenable. AI can accelerate data analysis, regulatory compliance checks, and report generation, but the physical fieldwork, site-specific judgment, and stakeholder advisory roles provide meaningful barriers to full displacement.
description:
## Specialister inom miljöskydd och miljöteknik (SSYK 2183)

These professionals assess and manage environmental risks by conducting field investigations, analyzing pollution levels in soil, water, and air, and developing measures to reduce environmental impact from industries, municipalities, or construction projects. Their work combines physical fieldwork – collecting samples, inspecting sites, and measuring emissions – with significant digital work involving GIS tools, environmental modeling software, databases, and report writing. They also review permit applications, ensure regulatory compliance under Swedish environmental law (miljöbalken), and advise companies and authorities on sustainable practices.

name: Psykologer
rationale: Psychologists face moderate-to-significant AI exposure: administrative tasks like clinical documentation, report writing, and standardized test interpretation are highly automatable, and AI already assists with screening and assessment tools. However, the therapeutic relationship, real-time empathic attunement, and complex clinical judgment in face-to-face or video sessions provide a meaningful barrier to full automation, keeping exposure below the high end of the scale.
description: Swedish psychologists (SSYK 2241) primarily assess, diagnose, and treat mental health conditions and psychological difficulties through structured conversations, psychological testing, and evidence-based therapeutic methods such as KBT (cognitive behavioral therapy) or PDT. Their work involves administering and interpreting standardized assessment tools (e.g., WAIS, MMSE, personality inventories), writing clinical documentation, and collaborating with other healthcare professionals, much of which is handled digitally through journal systems like TakeCare or Procapita. The work is a mix of physical face-to-face sessions with clients and digital administrative tasks, with an increasing element of remote therapy conducted via video platforms.

name: Övriga universitets- och högskollärare
name_en: University and higher education teachers not elsewhere classified
rationale: University teachers in miscellaneous fields face significant AI exposure in content creation, grading, research assistance, and administrative tasks, but retain strong barriers in physical classroom presence, hands-on supervision, mentoring relationships, and practical/artistic instruction that requires in-person interaction. The hybrid nature of the role — combining digital lecture preparation and assessment (highly automatable) with face-to-face seminars, studio work, and individualized student guidance (harder to automate) — places them in the mid-range.
description: Swedish **övriga universitets- och högskollärare (SSYK 2319)** arbetar med undervisning, handledning och examination vid högskolor och universitet inom ämnesområden som inte faller under mer specialiserade lärarkategorier, exempelvis vissa praktiska, konstnärliga eller tvärvetenskapliga ämnen. Det dagliga arbetet innefattar att planera och hålla föreläsningar, seminarier och workshops, handleda studenter i uppsatser eller projekt samt konstruera och bedöma examinationsuppgifter. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och fysiskt – de använder lärplattformar som Canvas eller Blackboard, videokonferensverktyg och digitala examinationssystem, men möter också studenter fysiskt i sal och kan arbeta med fysiska material bero

name: Studie- och yrkesvägledare
rationale: The core of this role — individualized guidance conversations and building trust with students navigating major life decisions — requires human empathy, relationship skills, and contextual judgment that AI cannot fully replicate, providing a meaningful barrier to automation. However, significant portions of the work (researching programs, documenting sessions, compiling catalogues, answering routine questions about admissions) are highly automatable, and AI tools could dramatically reduce the number of counsellors needed by handling informational queries and administrative tasks at scale.
description: A Swedish Studie- och yrkesvägledare (SYV) primarily conducts individual guidance conversations with students to help them make informed choices about upper secondary programs, higher education, or career paths, using tools like Arbetsförmedlingens databases, UHR's admission systems, and platforms such as Utbildningsinfo.se and Jobtech. They also lead group sessions and informational workshops in classrooms, and spend significant time on administrative tasks such as documenting conversations, compiling course catalogues, and coordinating with teachers and school management. The work is a mix of physical face-to-face meetings (the core of the role) and digital work, with digital tools increasingly central for research, documentation, and sometimes remote counselling sessions via video.

name: Övriga pedagoger med teoretisk specialistkompetens
rationale: This role involves a mix of digital content creation, curriculum planning, and communication tasks that AI can significantly assist with or automate, but the core delivery of specialized pedagogy—workshops, lectures, museum education, folk education—requires physical presence and human interaction that creates a natural barrier. The balance between digitally-intensive preparation work (high AI exposure) and in-person facilitation and counseling (lower AI exposure) places this occupation in the mid-range.
description: En pedagog i denna kategori arbetar typiskt med specialiserad undervisning eller handledning inom områden som faller utanför de mer standardiserade lärarrollerna – exempelvis som studievägledare, pedagogisk konsult, utbildare inom specifika yrkes- eller teorifält, eller som pedagog inom museipedagogik eller folkbildning. I det dagliga arbetet planerar och genomför de utbildningsinsatser, håller föreläsningar eller workshops, och tar fram läromedel och kursmaterial, ofta med hjälp av digitala verktyg som presentationsprogram, lärplattformar (exempelvis Canvas eller Moodle) och kommunikationsverktyg. Arbetet är en blandning av digitalt och fysiskt – digitalt när det gäller dokumentation, kommunikation och materialprodu

name: Domare
rationale: Judges perform substantial screen-based work — legal research, document review, and drafting judgments — that AI can meaningfully augment, potentially reducing the time needed per case or the number of judges required for administrative matters. However, the role carries significant institutional authority, requires courtroom presence, exercises discretionary judgment in adversarial proceedings, and faces strong legal and democratic barriers to automation, anchoring the exposure at a moderate level.
description: Swedish judges (**domare**) primarily preside over court proceedings – reviewing legal documents, hearing testimony from parties and witnesses, and issuing rulings and verdicts in civil, criminal, or administrative cases. Their daily work involves extensive reading and writing of legal texts, case preparation, and drafting judgments (domar), using case management systems like **Vera** (used in Swedish courts) alongside standard office tools. The work is a mix of digital (document review, legal databases such as Karnov or Zeteo, digital case files) and physical (courtroom hearings, face-to-face proceedings), though administrative and preparatory work is predominantly screen-based.

name: Bildkonstnärer m.fl.
rationale: Visual artists face significant AI exposure in digital illustration, concept generation, and image creation workflows, where tools like Midjourney and Stable Diffusion can replicate or assist many tasks at scale, reducing demand for commercial illustrators and graphic artists. However, fine artists working with physical media (sculpture, painting, printmaking) retain a meaningful barrier through manual craft, material presence, and the cultural premium placed on human-authored original works, keeping overall exposure moderate rather than high.
description: Swedish visual artists (Bildkonstnärer m.fl., SSYK 2651) create original works of art such as paintings, sculptures, illustrations, prints, and installations, working with materials like oil and acrylic paint, clay, metal, textiles, or printmaking tools depending on their specialization. Their daily work involves conceptualizing and producing artwork, preparing exhibitions, applying for grants, and communicating with galleries, clients, or commissioners. The work spans both physical and digital domains — traditional studio-based craft remains central for many, while illustrators and certain artists increasingly use digital tools such as drawing tablets and software like Adobe Illustrator or Photoshop as primary or complementary instruments.

name: Socialsekreterare
rationale: A significant portion of a Socialsekreterare's work — writing investigations, formal decisions, and documentation in case management systems — is highly exposed to AI assistance or automation, and AI tools could substantially accelerate these administrative tasks. However, the role's core requires legally accountable authority decisions (myndighetsutövning), trust-based client relationships, home visits, and ethical judgment in sensitive child welfare or care placement cases, creating strong barriers to full automation that anchor the score in the mid-range.
description: A Swedish Socialsekreterare investigates and assesses individuals' and families' needs for social support, makes authority decisions (myndighetsutövning) regarding interventions such as financial assistance (ekonomiskt bistånd), child welfare measures, or care placements, and follows up on ongoing cases. The work relies heavily on documentation in case management systems like **Treserva, Viva, or Procapita**, writing formal investigations and decisions according to the Social Services Act (Socialtjänstlagen). The work is a mix of digital administration and physical interaction — including home visits, client meetings, and collaboration with schools, healthcare, and other agencies — but administrative documentation takes up a substantial and often dominant portion of the working day.

name: Ingenjörer och tekniker inom bygg och anläggning
rationale: Construction and civil engineering technicians have significant digital components (CAD, BIM modeling, documentation, calculations) that are increasingly automatable by AI tools, but the recurring physical site presence for inspections, measurements, and quality checks provides a meaningful barrier to full automation. AI will substantially augment and reduce headcount for the office-based tasks while the on-site coordination and inspection duties require physical presence and contextual judgment that limits overall exposure.
description: **Construction and Civil Engineering Technicians (SSYK 3112)** work with planning, supervision, and coordination of construction and infrastructure projects, including buildings, roads, and civil engineering works. Their daily tasks typically include reviewing and producing technical drawings and documentation using CAD software (such as AutoCAD or Revit), conducting site inspections to ensure work meets specifications and standards, and communicating between contractors, engineers, and clients. The work is a mix of both digital (calculations, drawings, project documentation, BIM modeling) and physical (on-site visits, measurements, quality checks), though site presence is a recurring and important part of the role.

name: Företagssäljare
rationale: AI can significantly automate parts of the sales process such as lead scoring, CRM management, email outreach, and proposal generation, and AI tools are already transforming prospecting and follow-up workflows. However, the role's core value lies in human relationship-building, trust, negotiation, and in-person client meetings, which creates a meaningful barrier to full automation and keeps exposure moderate.
description: En företagssäljare arbetar med att identifiera och bearbeta potentiella företagskunder genom uppsökande försäljning, kundmöten och förhandlingar – både på plats hos kunden och via telefon eller digitala möten. De använder verktyg som CRM-system (exempelvis Salesforce eller HubSpot), offertverktyg och telefon för att hantera kundrelationer, följa upp leads och driva affärer genom säljprocessen. Arbetet är en kombination av fysiskt och digitalt, med fältbesök hos kunder balanserat mot administrativt arbete och digital kommunikation från kontoret.

name: Evenemangs- och reseproducenter m.fl.
rationale: A substantial portion of event and travel planning — research, budgeting, supplier communication, itinerary creation, and administrative coordination — is screen-based and highly susceptible to AI automation and productivity enhancement. However, the role retains meaningful AI resistance through physical on-site presence, real-time human judgment during live events, vendor relationship management, and creative experiential design that still benefits from human touch.
description: Swedish **Evenemangs- och reseproducenter** (SSYK 3332) plan, coordinate and execute events such as conferences, corporate gatherings, concerts or travel packages, handling everything from venue bookings and supplier negotiations to logistics and on-site management. Their daily work involves a mix of digital tools — such as booking systems, project management software (e.g. spreadsheets, Asana), email communication and budgeting tools — alongside physical, hands-on work at venues when setting up and overseeing events. The role is fundamentally hybrid: much of the preparation and administration is screen-based, but a significant and distinctive part of the job requires physical presence on location to coordinate staff, vendors and participants in real time.

name: Fastighetsmäklare
rationale: Real estate agents have significant digital and administrative components — listings, valuations, CRM management, legal documentation, and contract handling — that AI can increasingly automate or augment, reducing the number of agents needed per transaction. However, the role retains meaningful physical and relational barriers: property visits, open houses, face-to-face negotiations, and the trust-based client relationships that Swedish buyers and sellers typically expect make full automation unlikely in the near term.
description: Swedish fastighetsmäklare primarily handle the buying and selling of residential and commercial properties, conducting property valuations, writing sales listings, coordinating viewings, and managing negotiations and bidding processes between buyers and sellers. Their work combines physical tasks — such as visiting properties, hosting open houses, and meeting clients — with significant digital work using platforms like Hemnet and Booli for listings, CRM systems for client management, and digital signing tools like Scrive for contracts. They also handle substantial administrative and legal documentation, including title deeds, mortgage paperwork, and compliance with Swedish real estate law (fastighetsmäklarlagen).

name: Fastighetsförvaltare
rationale: Real estate administrators perform a significant portion of office-based digital tasks — invoice handling, documentation, rental agreements, fault report management — that are highly susceptible to AI automation and productivity gains. However, the role retains meaningful AI-resistant components through physical property inspections, on-site contractor coordination, and relationship-based tenant interactions that require physical presence and judgment in unpredictable real-world situations.
description: A Swedish Fastighetsförvaltare handles the day-to-day operation and maintenance of residential or commercial properties, including coordinating repairs, managing tenant contacts, handling rental agreements, and overseeing budgets and operating costs. They work with property management software (such as Vitec or Momentum), email, and phone as their primary tools, while also conducting physical inspections of buildings and meeting with contractors, tenants, and property owners on-site. The work is a mix of digital administration and physical presence, though a significant portion of the day involves office-based tasks like invoice handling, fault report management, and documentation.

name: Uthyrare
rationale: Rental salespersons handle a mix of in-person/phone customer interactions and physical property or asset inspections that resist full automation, but a large portion of their work—managing bookings, drafting contracts, CRM administration, and customer follow-ups—is highly automatable by AI. The role's blend of face-to-face negotiation and relationship management provides some buffer, but AI tools can increasingly handle lead qualification, contract generation, and routine customer inquiries, reducing headcount needs significantly.
description: A Swedish **Uthyrare** primarily works with renting out properties, vehicles, equipment, or similar assets to customers, handling inquiries, negotiating rental terms, and signing contracts. Their daily work involves a mix of customer meetings (in person or by phone), administrative tasks in booking and rental management systems (such as property management software, CRM tools, or fleet systems), and following up on ongoing rental agreements. The work is a blend of physical customer interaction and digital administration, with significant time spent on screens managing bookings, contracts, and customer communication.

name: Processövervakare, metallproduktion
rationale: Metal production process controllers work primarily through computerized DCS/SCADA systems monitoring screens and adjusting parameters, making the cognitive/monitoring aspects highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization algorithms. However, the role retains significant physical presence requirements — plant walkarounds, physical sampling, hands-on anomaly investigation, and real-time response to unpredictable industrial conditions — which act as a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement.
description: En processövervakare inom metallproduktion övervakar och styr tillverkningsprocesser som smältning, gjutning, valsning eller härdning av metaller, vanligtvis från ett kontrollrum med hjälp av datoriserade styrsystem (DCS/SCADA) och instrumentpaneler. Arbetet innebär att kontinuerligt läsa av mätdata som temperatur, tryck och flöden, justera processparametrar och reagera på larm för att hålla produktionen inom specifikation. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt (skärmövervakning och systemstyrning) och fysiskt (rundvandringar i anläggningen, provtagning och enklare underhållskontroller).

name: Övriga drifttekniker och processövervakare
name_en: Process control technicians not elsewhere classified
rationale: Process control technicians work substantially with SCADA systems and digital monitoring interfaces that AI can increasingly automate or augment, enabling predictive alerts and autonomous parameter adjustments that reduce the need for human oversight. However, the job retains a significant physical component — facility walkthroughs, hands-on equipment checks, and on-site interventions — which provides a natural barrier against full AI displacement, keeping exposure moderate rather than high.
description: **Övriga drifttekniker och processövervakare (SSYK 8199)** övervakar och reglerar industriella processer och maskiner som inte faller under mer specifika yrkeskategorier, exempelvis inom energiproduktion, vattenrening eller tillverkningsindustri. De arbetar med kontrollpaneler, SCADA-system och andra övervakningssystem för att säkerställa att processer löper korrekt, och åtgärdar störningar eller justerar parametrar vid avvikelser. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt (skärmbaserad processövervakning och loggning) och fysiskt (rundvandringar, kontroll av utrustning och enklare underhållsåtgärder ute i anläggningen).

name: Verkställande direktörer m.fl.
rationale: CEOs and chief executives perform highly cognitive, strategic, and interpersonal work that is largely conducted digitally, making parts of it susceptible to AI augmentation in areas like data analysis, reporting, and decision support. However, the role is fundamentally anchored in relationship-building, trust, accountability, negotiation, and organizational leadership — human qualities that are difficult to automate — which places it at a moderate exposure level rather than high.
description: **Verkställande direktörer m.fl. (SSYK 1120)** leder och styr organisationer eller företag genom att fatta strategiska beslut, sätta mål och fördela resurser mellan avdelningar. Det dagliga arbetet består till stor del av möten, förhandlingar, budgetuppföljning och rapportering till styrelser eller ägare, och utförs primärt digitalt via verktyg som e-post, videomöten (Teams/Zoom), affärssystem (ERP) och presentationsprogram. Arbetet är övervägande kognitivt och kommunikativt snarare än fysiskt, men innefattar också resor och personliga möten med kunder, partners och medarbetare.

name: Enhetschefer inom socialt och kurativt arbete, nivå 2
name_en: Unit managers in social and curative care, level 2
rationale: This role combines substantial digital administrative work (scheduling, budget follow-up, documentation in case management systems, reporting) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with essential people-leadership functions requiring physical presence, emotional intelligence, and real-time judgment in complex social care contexts. The hybrid nature — part desk-based management, part on-site staff supervision and stakeholder collaboration in sensitive human services — provides a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement, placing it in the mid-range.
description: **Enhetschef inom socialt och kurativt arbete, nivå 2** manages a team of social workers or care staff within areas such as elderly care, disability services, or social services, handling day-to-day operational leadership including scheduling, staff supervision, budget follow-up, and ensuring quality and legal compliance in service delivery. Their work is primarily conducted through digital administrative systems such as **Procapita, Treserva, or Combine** (case management and personnel systems), along with email, video meetings, and HR platforms for documentation, reporting, and communication. While most administrative tasks are digital, the role also involves regular physical presence on-site — conducting staff meetings, client-related follow-ups, and collaboration with other units or authorities.

name: Kemister
rationale: Chemists perform a significant portion of their work in physical laboratories using specialized equipment, creating a natural barrier to full AI automation. However, the analytical, interpretive, documentation, and literature-review aspects of the role are highly exposed to AI augmentation, and AI-driven automation in experimental design and data analysis is rapidly reducing the human effort needed per experiment.
description: Swedish kemister (SSYK 2113) arbetar primärt med att planera och genomföra laboratorieexperiment, analysera kemiska ämnen och processer samt tolka och rapportera resultat. De använder fysiska verktyg som spektrometrar, kromatografer och laboratorieglasvaror, men arbetar också digitalt med specialiserad analysprogramvara, databaser och dokumentationssystem. Arbetet är därmed en kombination av praktiskt laboratoriearbete och datorbaserat analysarbete, där båda delarna är centrala för yrkesrollen.

name: Gymnasielärare
rationale: Gymnasielärare work combines substantial computer-based tasks (lesson planning, grading, feedback, administration) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with mandatory physical classroom presence and real-time student interaction that resist full automation. AI will likely reduce time spent on administrative and assessment tasks and may allow productivity gains, but the core pedagogical and relational role in a physical classroom setting provides a meaningful barrier to displacement.
description: A Swedish gymnasielärare plans and delivers lessons within one or more subjects at upper secondary level (gymnasiet), assessing student work through written tests, oral examinations, and longer assignments while documenting grades and progress in digital school platforms such as Skolplattformen, Unikum, or Google Classroom. Their daily work combines standing in front of a classroom with significant time at a computer preparing materials, giving feedback, and handling administrative tasks like attendance and individual development plans. The work is a mix of physical presence and digital tools, with interactive whiteboards, presentation software, and learning management systems being central to most teaching days.

name: Tandtekniker och ortopedingenjörer m.fl.
rationale: Dental and orthopaedic technicians face moderate AI exposure because the digital design components (CAD/CAM, 3D modelling) are increasingly automatable through AI-driven software, and AI-powered milling and 3D printing can reduce the need for manual fabrication steps. However, the hands-on workshop nature of the work — handling physical materials, fitting adjustments, and tactile craftsmanship — provides a meaningful barrier to full automation, keeping exposure at a mid-range level.
description: Swedish dental and orthopaedic technicians primarily do **hands-on physical fabrication work** – constructing dental prostheses (crowns, bridges, dentures) or orthopaedic aids such as braces, prosthetic limbs, and orthoses based on prescriptions from dentists or physicians. They work with materials like acrylic, ceramics, metals, plaster, and thermoplastics, using tools such as lathes, grinders, furnaces, and casting equipment, alongside increasingly common **digital tools** like CAD/CAM software and 3D printers for design and milling. Their workday is largely **workshop-based and manual**, requiring both technical precision and craftsmanship, though the profession is gradually shifting toward a blend of digital design and traditional fabrication techniques.

name: Kontorsreceptionister
rationale: Office receptionists perform significant digital tasks (call routing, email handling, booking systems) that AI and automation can increasingly handle through virtual assistants, chatbots, and smart scheduling tools, creating meaningful exposure. However, the physical presence requirements — greeting visitors, managing mail, maintaining the reception area, and providing face-to-face human interaction as the organization's first point of contact — provide a natural barrier that limits full automation, keeping the score in the mid-range.
description: Swedish office receptionists primarily handle incoming calls, emails, and visitors – greeting guests, directing inquiries, and managing bookings or meeting room scheduling. They work extensively with digital tools such as email clients, booking systems, and office software (e.g., Microsoft Office/Outlook), while also handling physical tasks like managing mail, organizing reception areas, and maintaining printed materials. The role is a mix of digital and interpersonal/physical work, serving as the first point of contact and administrative support hub for the organization.

name: SOS-operatörer m.fl.
rationale: Emergency call operators work entirely on computers and digital systems, making them technically susceptible to AI automation for tasks like call triage, location identification, and resource dispatching — and AI tools are already being piloted in this domain. However, the high-stakes real-time nature of life-or-death decisions, the need to handle chaotic and emotionally volatile callers, legal accountability, and public trust requirements create significant barriers to full automation, keeping exposure moderate rather than high.
description: Swedish SOS-operatörer tar emot nödsamtal via telefon (112) och andra kommunikationskanaler, bedömer situationens allvarlighetsgrad och koordinerar utryckning av räddningstjänst, polis eller ambulans. Arbetet utförs nästan uteslutande digitalt via specialiserade datorbaserade ledningssystem (t.ex. SOS Alarms egna plattformar), kartsystem och radiokommunikation för att lokalisera händelser och dirigera räddningsresurser i realtid. Operatörerna arbetar under hög tidspress och måste simultant hantera flera samtal, föra dokumentation och hålla kontakt med fältenheter – allt från en stationär arbetsplats i en larmcentral.

name: Fastighets- och förvaltningschefer, nivå 2
name_en: Real estate and head of administration managers, level 2
rationale: This role combines substantial office-based administrative work (lease management, budgeting, reporting) that is increasingly automatable with AI-powered property management tools, but also requires significant physical presence for site inspections, contractor coordination, and tenant relations that resist automation. The managerial, relational, and on-site components create a meaningful barrier, placing it in the mid-range where AI will streamline workload and reduce headcount needs but not displace the role wholesale.
description: **Swedish Fastighets- och förvaltningschef (SSYK 1352)** primarily manages the operation, maintenance, and administration of property portfolios – overseeing rental agreements, budgets, maintenance planning, and tenant relations. Their daily work involves a mix of digital tools (property management systems like Vitec or Momentum, Excel, email, and procurement platforms) and physical site inspections of buildings to assess condition, follow up on repairs, and meet contractors or tenants. The role is roughly equally split between office-based administrative work and on-site presence, coordinating staff such as caretakers and service technicians while reporting to ownership or board level.

name: Produktionschefer inom tillverkning, nivå 2
rationale: Production managers in manufacturing combine significant physical presence on the factory floor — monitoring workflows, troubleshooting disruptions, and coordinating hands-on staff — with digital planning and reporting tasks that AI can increasingly assist with or automate, such as scheduling, KPI tracking, and ERP-based decision support. The physical operational oversight, real-time human coordination, and contextual judgment required in dynamic factory environments create a natural barrier to full AI displacement, but AI tools will meaningfully reduce the cognitive load and number of managers needed as predictive analytics and automated scheduling mature.
description:
**Swedish Production Manager in Manufacturing (SSYK 1372, level 2)**

These managers oversee and coordinate day-to-day production operations in manufacturing facilities, planning staffing, scheduling shifts, and ensuring output targets and quality standards are met. They work hands-on in the factory environment, regularly walking the production floor to monitor workflows, troubleshoot disruptions, and liaise with machine operators, maintenance staff, and logistics personnel. Their work combines physical presence on the shop floor with digital tools such as ERP systems (e.g., SAP or Monitor), production planning software, and reporting dashboards to track KPIs like throughput, downtime, and scrap rates.

name: Förskolechefer, nivå 2
rationale: Pre-school managers handle significant administrative work (scheduling, budgeting, reporting, documentation) that AI can increasingly automate or streamline, placing meaningful pressure on the role. However, the job requires substantial physical on-site presence, real-time interpersonal judgment with staff and families, and leadership in emotionally complex situations that create a strong natural barrier to full AI displacement.
description:
## Förskolechef, nivå 2 (SSYK 1422)

A pre-school manager at this level oversees the daily operations of one or more pre-school units, managing staff, budgets, and ensuring pedagogical quality in line with the Swedish curriculum (*läroplanen för förskolan*). Their work involves a mix of administrative tasks — such as scheduling, staff evaluations, and budget follow-up in digital systems like Hypernet, Personec, or municipal HR/economy platforms — alongside physical presence on-site to support educators and handle practical matters. The role is roughly split between digital desk work (email, documentation, reporting to municipal management) and interpersonal, on-site work with staff, children's families, and colleagues.

name: Klinik- och verksamhetschefer inom hälsa och sjukvård, nivå 1
name_en: Clinical and operations managers in health care, level 1
rationale: Clinical and operations managers in health care blend significant digital-administrative work (budgeting, reporting, quality metrics, scheduling) that AI can increasingly automate or augment with essential physical presence, interpersonal leadership, and real-time decision-making in complex human environments. While AI tools will reduce administrative burden and improve planning efficiency, the core leadership functions requiring trust, judgment, and direct staff/patient engagement provide meaningful resistance to full displacement.
description: **Clinical and Operations Managers in Health Care, Level 1 (SSYK 1511)** lead and coordinate clinical departments or units within hospitals, primary care, or specialized care settings, with responsibilities including staff management, budget oversight, quality assurance, and ensuring that care delivery meets regulatory and organizational standards. Their daily work involves meetings, planning sessions, performance follow-ups, and personnel matters, using digital tools such as electronic health record systems (e.g., Take Care, Cosmic, or NCS Cross), administrative platforms, and reporting systems for resource allocation and quality metrics. The role is a mix of digital administrative work and physical presence on the unit, as direct communication with medical staff, nurses, and other personnel is a central part of maintaining operational flow.

name: Övriga chefer inom samhällsservice, nivå 1
name_en: Managers in public services not elsewhere classified, level 1
rationale: These public service managers perform a mix of digital tasks (report writing, budget management, meetings) that AI can increasingly support or automate, but their role is heavily anchored in physical presence, personnel leadership, political stakeholder management, and oversight of on-the-ground operations like emergency services or cemetery administration. The blend of administrative work with real-world coordination, public accountability, and human judgment in sensitive civic contexts provides meaningful barriers to full AI displacement, landing this role in the mid-range.
description:
## Övriga chefer inom samhällsservice, nivå 1 (SSYK 1591)

Dessa chefer leder och samordnar verksamheter inom offentlig service som inte faller under mer specifika kategorier, exempelvis inom räddningstjänst, begravningsverksamhet, kyrklig förvaltning eller liknande samhällsfunktioner – de ansvarar för personal, budget, verksamhetsplanering och kontakter med myndigheter och politiker. Det dagliga arbetet innebär möten, rapportskrivning, personalsamtal och uppföljning av verksamhetsmål, med stöd av digitala verktyg som ekonomisystem (exempelvis Agresso/Unit4), ärendehanteringssystem och Office-paketet. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt

name: Övriga verksamhetschefer inom samhällsservice, nivå 2
name_en: Operations managers in public services not elsewhere classified, level 2
rationale: These operations managers combine significant digital administrative work (budgeting, reporting, scheduling in ERP systems) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, but their role also requires physical site presence, stakeholder dialogue, and contextual judgment in managing diverse public-service units like cemeteries or emergency preparedness. The blend of desk-based coordination and field-level human oversight places them in a moderate exposure range — AI can handle much of the administrative burden, but the relational, contextual, and physically-present dimensions create meaningful barriers to full displacement.
description:
## Övriga verksamhetschefer inom samhällsservice, nivå 2 (SSYK 1592)

These managers oversee operational units within public or community services that don't fit neatly into other classified categories — such as cemetery administration, civil emergency preparedness, or municipal facility services — and their daily work involves planning staffing, managing budgets, and coordinating service delivery to ensure operations run smoothly. They work primarily in office settings using digital tools such as business systems (e.g., municipality-specific ERP or planning systems), email, and spreadsheets for reporting and resource planning, while also conducting physical site visits, staff meetings, and stakeholder dialogues. Their work is a **mix of digital administration and physical presence**, as they must balance desk-based management tasks with hands-on oversight of personnel and facilities in the field.

name: Chefer inom handel, nivå 2
name_en: Retail and wholesale trade managers, level 2
rationale: Retail and wholesale trade managers at this level perform a significant mix of administrative tasks (scheduling, sales reporting, KPI tracking, inventory management) that are increasingly automatable by AI, while also requiring substantial physical presence on the floor, real-time staff coaching, and hands-on operational oversight that resist full automation. AI will streamline the analytical and administrative portions considerably, reducing workload and potentially headcount, but the leadership, human interaction, and physical presence components provide a meaningful barrier to full displacement.
description: En chef inom handel på nivå 2 (exempelvis butikschef eller avdelningschef i detaljhandel eller grossisthandel) ansvarar för den operativa driften – det innebär personalplanering, schemaläggning, uppföljning av försäljning och lönsamhet samt hantering av lager och varuflöden. I det dagliga arbetet används verktyg som affärssystem (exempelvis SAP eller branschspecifika POS- och lagersystem), Excel och rapporteringsverktyg för att följa upp nyckeltal som omsättning, svinn och kundnöjdhet. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt (administrativa uppgifter, rapportering, kommunikation) och fysiskt (närvaro i butik/lager, medarbetarcoachning

name: Chefer inom övrig servicenäring, nivå 1
name_en: Other services managers not elsewhere classified, level 1
rationale: These service managers work in a mix of physical presence and administrative tasks, managing staff, scheduling, budgeting, and customer relations in sectors like laundries, funeral homes, or pet care — requiring on-site oversight and interpersonal judgment that limits full automation. However, the administrative components (scheduling, bookkeeping, reporting) are increasingly AI-assisted, and AI tools can significantly boost individual productivity, reducing headcount needs at the managerial level over time.
description:
## Chefer inom övrig servicenäring, nivå 1 (SSYK 1791)

Dessa chefer leder och organiserar verksamheter inom serviceyrken som inte faller under mer specifika kategorier – exempelvis tvätterier, begravningsbyråer, solarier, djurvård eller liknande serviceföretag – och ansvarar för personal, schemaläggning, budgetering och kundrelationer. Det dagliga arbetet är en mix av fysisk närvaro på arbetsplatsen och digitalt administrativt arbete, där de använder verktyg som affärssystem, bokföringsprogram och schemaläggningsprogram (t.ex. Visma eller liknande). Arbetet innebär löpande kontakt med anställda, leverantörer och kunder, och k

name: Specialister och rådgivare inom lantbruk m.m.
rationale: Agricultural advisors have significant exposure to AI through automation of report writing, subsidy applications, GIS analysis, soil/crop diagnostics, and farm management recommendations — tasks increasingly handled by precision agriculture AI tools. However, the role's inherently hybrid nature, requiring frequent on-site farm visits, physical inspection of crops and livestock, and trust-based client relationships with farmers, creates meaningful barriers that limit full AI displacement.
description:
**Swedish Agricultural Specialists and Advisors (SSYK 2134)**

These professionals advise farmers, landowners, and agricultural businesses on crop production, animal husbandry, soil management, and business economics, often conducting farm visits to assess conditions on-site. Their work combines physical fieldwork – inspecting crops, soils, and livestock – with digital tools such as GIS mapping software, farm management systems, and EU subsidy application platforms (e.g., SAM-ansökan via Jordbruksverket). A typical workday might shift between driving to client farms for hands-on consultations and office-based analysis, report writing, and regulatory guidance, making the role distinctly hybrid in nature.

name: Dietister
rationale: Dieticians combine direct patient consultations, clinical judgment, and interdisciplinary collaboration that require physical presence and interpersonal skills, creating meaningful barriers to full AI automation. However, significant portions of their work — dietary analysis, meal plan generation, nutritional calculations, documentation, and patient education materials — are highly susceptible to AI augmentation, likely reducing the number of practitioners needed as AI tools handle routine assessments and planning tasks.
description: Swedish dietister assess and treat patients with nutritional needs or diet-related conditions, such as diabetes, eating disorders, kidney disease, or malnutrition, typically through individual consultations and group education. Their work combines physical patient meetings with digital documentation in medical record systems (such as Take Care, Cosmic, or Millennium), and they use tools like dietary analysis software (e.g., Dietist Net) to calculate nutrient intake and develop individualized meal plans. The role is a mix of direct patient interaction, administrative documentation, and collaboration with other healthcare professionals such as physicians and nurses within a clinical setting.

name: Arkeologer och specialister inom humaniora m.m.
rationale: Archaeology involves substantial physical fieldwork — excavations, surveys, and hands-on artifact handling — that AI cannot automate, creating a natural barrier to full AI displacement. However, the significant office and lab-based components (report writing, GIS analysis, artifact classification, literature review, and documentation) are increasingly AI-augmentable, meaning fewer specialists may be needed per project even as field presence remains essential.
description: Swedish archaeologists and related humanities specialists (SSYK 2623) primarily conduct fieldwork such as excavations, surveys, and documentation of cultural heritage sites, using tools like trowels, shovels, measuring equipment, and GPS devices to uncover and record physical findings. They also analyze artifacts, bone material, and stratigraphic layers in the field and in laboratory settings, and compile findings into detailed reports using GIS software, database systems, and documentation tools such as Total Station and digital photography. The work is a clear mix of physically demanding outdoor fieldwork and office- or lab-based digital documentation, with the balance shifting depending on whether a project is in an active excavation phase or a reporting phase.

name: Regissörer och producenter av film, teater m.m.
name_en: Film, stage and related directors and producers
rationale: Directors and producers combine highly physical, on-set coordination work (rehearsals, shoots, live performances) with creative decision-making that requires human judgment, taste, and interpersonal leadership that AI cannot fully replicate. However, AI will increasingly assist with pre/post-production tasks like script analysis, scheduling, budgeting, editing, and even generative visual content, reducing the labor needed in those phases and moderately reshaping the overall role.
description: En regissör eller producent inom film, teater och liknande leder och samordnar det konstnärliga och/eller administrativa arbetet i en produktion – regissören arbetar nära skådespelare, manusförfattare och teknisk personal för att forma berättelsen och det visuella uttrycket, medan producenten hanterar budget, tidscheman och avtal. Arbetet kombinerar fysiska moment som repetitioner, inspelningar och scenarbete med digitala verktyg som redigeringsprogram (t.ex. Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro), projektledningssystem och kommunikationsplattformar. Balansen mellan digitalt och fysiskt varierar stort beroende på fas – förproduktion och efterproduktion är mer skrivbords- och skärmbaserade, medan inspelning och repetitionsperioder är utp

name: Övriga ingenjörer och tekniker
rationale: This occupation involves a mix of physical fieldwork (calibration, equipment inspection, installation) and digital tasks (documentation, CAD, data analysis), with the physical components providing a natural barrier to full AI automation. However, the digital aspects—technical documentation, reporting, system monitoring, and calculations—are increasingly automatable by AI, raising exposure moderately above purely hands-on technical roles.
description: **Övriga ingenjörer och tekniker (SSYK 3119)** arbetar med tekniskt stöd och problemlösning inom områden som inte täcks av mer specialiserade teknikerkategorier, exempelvis inom mätning, kalibrering, teknisk dokumentation eller processtekniskt underhåll. I det dagliga arbetet använder de verktyg som mätinstrument, tekniska ritningar, CAD-program och specialiserad mjukvara för datainsamling och analys. Arbetet är typiskt **blandat** – både fysiskt (fältarbete, utrustningskontroll, installation) och digitalt (rapportskrivning, systemövervakning, tekniska beräkningar).

name: Biomedicinska analytiker m.fl.
rationale: Medical laboratory technicians combine significant physical, hands-on work (specimen handling, pipetting, staining, operating analyzers) with digital tasks like data entry and result interpretation, creating a natural barrier to full AI automation. However, AI is increasingly automating image analysis (pathology slides, hematology differentials), anomaly detection, and result interpretation, while robotic systems are advancing in liquid handling — meaning fewer technicians may be needed even as the physical component persists.
description: **Biomedicinska analytiker** arbetar huvudsakligen med att analysera biologiska prover – som blod, urin och vävnadsprover – med hjälp av avancerad laboratorieutrustning som automatiserade analysatorer, mikroskop och PCR-instrument. Arbetet är en kombination av fysiskt hantverk (provtagning, pipettering, färgning av vävnadsprover, hantering av kemikalier) och digitalt arbete, där de registrerar, kvalitetsgranskar och tolkar analysresultat i laboratorieinformationssystem (LIS). De arbetar inom områden som klinisk kemi, hematologi, mikrobiologi, transfusionsmedicin och patologi, och deras resultat utgör direkt underlag för läkares diagnoser och behandlingsbeslut.

name: Friskvårdskonsulenter och hälsopedagoger m.fl.
rationale: Wellness consultants and health educators have significant physical and interpersonal components — leading workshops, fitness activities, and in-person coaching — that create natural barriers to full AI automation. However, substantial parts of their work such as health assessments, individualized action plans, lifestyle coaching content, documentation, and digital/remote coaching are increasingly AI-augmentable, placing this occupation in a moderate exposure range.
description: **Friskvårdskonsulenter och hälsopedagoger** arbetar med att planera, leda och genomföra hälsofrämjande insatser för individer eller grupper, exempelvis genom att hålla föreläsningar, workshops och friskvårdsaktiviteter inom företagshälsovård, kommuner eller träningsanläggningar. De gör hälsobedömningar, tar fram individuella eller kollektiva handlingsplaner och handleder klienter i livsstilsfrågor som kost, motion, stresshantering och ergonomi. Arbetet är till stor del fysiskt och personmötesinriktat, men innefattar även digitala inslag som dokumentation i journalsystem, digitala hälsoenkäter och ibland distanscoachning via video.

name: Bild- och sändningstekniker
rationale: Broadcasting and audio-visual technicians combine physical hardware work (rigging cameras, setting up equipment on location) with digital signal monitoring and configuration tasks, creating a mixed exposure profile. The hands-on, real-time production environment and need to physically manage equipment provide a natural barrier to full automation, though AI can increasingly handle signal monitoring, quality control, and some configuration tasks, gradually reducing the number of technicians needed per production.
description: En bild- och sändningstekniker ansvarar för att installera, drifta och felsöka teknisk utrustning för TV-produktion och sändning, såsom kameror, mixerbord, sändare och signalkedjor. Arbetet innebär både fysiskt handhavande av hårdvara – att rigga utrustning i studior eller på utomhusproduktioner – och digitalt arbete med signalövervakning, kodning och streamingteknik. Vanliga verktyg är videomixrar, routers för signaldistribution, konfigurationsprogram för sändarsystem samt övervakningspaneler för att säkerställa att bild- och ljudkvalitet håller rätt teknisk standard under direktsändning.

name: Hotellreceptionister m.fl.
rationale: Hotel receptionists work heavily within digital systems (PMS, payment processing, booking management) that AI can increasingly automate — chatbots, self-check-in kiosks, and AI booking assistants are already displacing routine tasks. However, the mandatory physical presence at the front desk, real-time face-to-face guest interaction, and the need to handle unexpected in-person situations create a meaningful barrier to full automation, keeping exposure moderate.
description: **Hotellreceptionister** tar emot och checkar in/ut gäster, hanterar bokningar, besvarar förfrågningar och löser praktiska problem under vistelsen. De arbetar primärt i datorbaserade boknings- och fastighetssystem (PMS) som Opera eller Mews, hanterar betalningar via kassasystem och kommunicerar via telefon och e-post. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och fysiskt – skärmar och system utgör kärnan, men den direkta gästkontakten i receptionen är central och kräver närvaro på plats.

name: Produktionschefer inom tillverkning, nivå 1
rationale: Production managers at this level combine significant physical presence on the factory floor — conducting rounds, managing real-time disruptions, and leading operators — with digital tasks like ERP scheduling, KPI tracking, and reporting, which AI can increasingly automate or augment. The physical, real-time coordination and people-management aspects create a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement, but AI tools will substantially reshape the administrative, planning, and analytical portions of the role, reducing headcount needs over time.
description: **Produktionschef inom tillverkning, nivå 1** ansvarar för att planera, leda och följa upp den dagliga produktionen i en tillverkningsanläggning – till exempel schemaläggning av personal, säkerställande av att produktionsmål och kvalitetskrav uppnås samt hantering av störningar i produktionsflödet. De arbetar i en kombination av digitala verktyg (såsom ERP-system som SAP eller Monitor, produktionsplaneringsverktyg och KPI-dashboards) och fysisk närvaro på fabriksgolvet där de genomför rondningar, möten med arbetsledare och operatörer samt löser praktiska problem i realtid. Arbetet är således **både digitalt och fysiskt** – administrative uppgifter sköts vid datorn medan en betydande del av

name: Avdelningschefer inom äldreomsorg, nivå 1
name_en: Department managers in elderly care, level 1
rationale: This role combines significant administrative tasks (scheduling, budget tracking, documentation in systems like Procapita/TES, staff reviews) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with essential physical presence requirements such as supervising care quality on-site, supporting staff in real environments, and managing human relationships. The hybrid nature — part desk-based management, part hands-on operational oversight in elderly care settings — places it in the mid-range, where AI will reduce administrative burden but cannot replace the physical presence, interpersonal judgment, and real-time situational leadership the role demands.
description: **Avdelningschef inom äldreomsorg, nivå 1** leder och organiserar det dagliga arbetet vid ett äldreboende eller en hemtjänstenhet, vilket inkluderar personalansvar, schemaläggning och uppföljning av vårdkvalitet. De arbetar i administrativa system som Procapita/TES (journalföring, bemanningsplanering) och hanterar budgetuppföljning, medarbetarsamtal och myndighetskontakter. Arbetet är en mix av digitalt administrativt arbete och fysisk närvaro i verksamheten, där de regelbundet befinner sig ute i omsorgsarbetets miljö för att stödja personal och säkerställa att omsorgen håller rätt standard.

name: Chefer inom handel, nivå 1
name_en: Retail and wholesale trade managers, level 1
rationale: Retail managers at this level combine significant physical presence — floor supervision, coaching staff, checking merchandise displays, and handling customer issues — with administrative tasks like scheduling, reporting, and ordering that AI can increasingly automate or assist with. The physical, interpersonal, and operational nature of the role creates a meaningful barrier to full AI displacement, but AI tools will reduce the administrative burden and improve decision-making efficiency, requiring fewer managers or reshaping the role substantially.
description: En chef inom handel på nivå 1 (exempelvis butikschef eller avdelningschef) ansvarar för den dagliga driften av en butik eller avdelning – det innebär personalledning, schemaläggning, försäljningsuppföljning och att säkerställa att varor exponeras och fylls på korrekt. Arbetet sker i en kombination av fysisk närvaro i butiksmiljön och digitala verktyg som kassasystem, affärssystem (t.ex. för lager och inköp), schemaläggningsprogram och rapporteringsverktyg. En typisk arbetsdag rör sig mellan golvet – att coacha personal, hantera kundärenden och kontrollera butikens skick – och administrativa uppgifter vid datorn som rör budget, beställningar

name: Chefer inom friskvård, sport och fritid, nivå 1
name_en: Sports, leisure and wellness managers, level 1
rationale: This role is hybrid by nature, requiring significant physical presence at sports and wellness facilities, personnel oversight, and real-time operational management that limits direct AI automation. However, the administrative components — scheduling, budgeting, communications, planning, and reporting — are meaningfully exposed to AI productivity tools, placing it in the mid-range similar to other management roles with strong on-site requirements.
description:
## Chefer inom friskvård, sport och fritid, nivå 1 (SSYK 1741)

Dessa chefer leder och samordnar verksamheter inom exempelvis gym, simhallar, idrottsanläggningar eller friskvårdsföretag, med ansvar för personal, budget och övergripande planering av aktiviteter och tjänster. Det dagliga arbetet innebär en kombination av fysisk närvaro i anläggningen – tillsyn av lokaler, möten med personal och kontakter med kunder eller föreningar – och administrativt digitalt arbete i form av schemaläggningssystem, ekonomiprogram och kommunikationsverktyg som e-post och bokningssystem. Rollen är tydligt hybrid: den fysiska närvaron och verksamhetsuppfölj

name: Miljö- och hälsoskyddsinspektörer
rationale: This occupation has a significant physical fieldwork component — on-site inspections, sample collection, and facility assessments — that creates a natural barrier to direct AI automation, similar to registered nurses or field engineers. However, the substantial administrative portion (writing inspection reports, formal decisions, permit handling, documentation) is highly exposed to AI productivity tools, meaning AI could meaningfully reduce the time needed for back-office work and potentially reduce headcount over time.
description: Swedish Miljö- och hälsoskyddsinspektörer primarily conduct on-site inspections of businesses, restaurants, food producers, and properties to verify compliance with environmental and public health regulations (such as the Miljöbalken and Livsmedelslagen). Their physical work includes collecting water or soil samples, measuring noise or air quality, reviewing facility conditions, and interviewing operators, while back in the office they document findings, write inspection reports, and handle permit applications using municipal case management systems (ärendehanteringssystem) like Ecos2 or ByggR. The work is a clear mix of physical fieldwork and digital administration, with significant time spent on formal written decisions and correspondence with both businesses and the public.

name: Apotekare
rationale: Pharmacists have significant AI exposure in prescription verification, drug interaction checking, and dosage validation — tasks increasingly handled by automated systems — but the physical dispensing, compounding, and direct patient counseling components create meaningful barriers to full automation. The regulatory compliance role, need for professional liability, and patient-facing trust dimension further anchor the occupation at a moderate exposure level, similar to physicians and nurses rather than pure knowledge workers.
description: Swedish apotekare primarily dispense and verify prescriptions, counsel patients on medications, interactions, and side effects, and ensure correct dosage and drug safety. Their work combines digital tools — such as prescription management systems (e.g., Pascal, Nationella ordinationsdatabasen) and electronic health records — with physical handling of medications, compounding, and inventory management. The role is a mix of patient-facing service, regulatory compliance, and pharmaceutical expertise, typically carried out in a pharmacy (apotek), hospital, or clinical setting.

name: Biståndsbedömare m.fl.
rationale: The role combines significant physical presence (home visits, face-to-face assessments) with substantial digital/administrative work (documentation, formal decisions, correspondence), creating a natural barrier to full automation. AI can meaningfully assist with documentation drafting, decision support, and case management, but the core professional judgment, empathy, and legal accountability in need assessments—combined with mandatory in-person elements—limits exposure compared to purely desk-based roles.
description: A Swedish **Biståndsbedömare** (often working within elderly care or disability services in municipal social services) assesses individuals' needs for public support and welfare services, such as home care, assisted living, or other social assistance, primarily under the Social Services Act (Socialtjänstlagen). Their daily work involves conducting structured interviews and home visits with clients, documenting assessments, making formal decisions (biståndsbeslut), and coordinating with care providers and other professionals. The work is a mix of physical (home visits, face-to-face meetings) and digital (documentation in case management systems such as Lifecare, Combine, or Treserva, handling administrative decisions and correspondence), with the digital/administrative component taking up a substantial portion of the working day.

name: Driftchefer inom bygg, anläggning och gruva, nivå 1
name_en: Production managers in construction and mining, level 1
rationale: Production managers in construction and mining require significant physical presence on-site for inspections, workforce supervision, and real-time problem-solving, which creates a natural barrier to full AI automation. However, the administrative components — scheduling, budget tracking, project coordination, and reporting — are increasingly AI-augmentable, and AI tools in BIM, planning, and project management are already reshaping productivity in this role.
description: **Driftchef inom bygg, anläggning och gruva (nivå 1)** ansvarar för att planera, leda och följa upp produktionen på byggarbetsplatser, anläggningsprojekt eller gruvmiljöer – vilket innefattar schemaläggning av arbetskraft och maskiner, samordning med underentreprenörer samt hantering av budget och tidplaner. Det dagliga arbetet innebär regelbunden fysisk närvaro ute på arbetsplatsen för inspektioner, arbetsledning och problemlösning, kombinerat med administrativt arbete i digitala projektledningsverktyg som Byggplanering, BIM-programvara, tidrapporteringssystem och MS Office. Arbetet är alltså en mix av fysiskt fältarbete och digital administration, där kommunik

name: Driftchefer inom bygg, anläggning och gruva, nivå 2
name_en: Production managers in construction and mining, level 2
rationale: Production managers in construction and mining require significant physical presence on-site for inspections, safety oversight, coordination of workers, and real-time problem-solving, which limits direct AI automation. However, AI can meaningfully augment the administrative and planning aspects — scheduling, resource allocation, reporting, and stakeholder communication — reducing workload and potentially the number of managers needed, justifying a moderate exposure score.
description: **Driftchefer inom bygg, anläggning och gruva (SSYK 1362)** leder och samordnar den operativa produktionen på byggarbetsplatser, anläggningsprojekt eller gruvor – de planerar arbetsmoment, fördelar resurser och personal, och säkerställer att tidsplaner, budgetar och säkerhetskrav följs. Arbetet är en blandning av fysisk närvaro ute på arbetsplatsen (ronder, kontroller, möten med arbetslag) och digitalt administrativt arbete i verktyg som projektledningssystem (exempelvis Buildsmart, Dalux eller MS Project), kalkylprogram och rapporteringsverktyg. De hanterar också kontakter med beställare, underentreprenörer och myndigheter,

name: Förvaltare inom skogsbruk och lantbruk m.fl.
rationale: Forestry and agricultural production managers split their time between physical outdoor work (supervising harvests, machinery, livestock, land maintenance) and administrative tasks (financial tracking, grant applications, planning software), creating a natural barrier to full AI automation. While AI can increasingly assist with planning, crop optimization, financial reporting, and digital tool usage, the hands-on operational oversight, physical presence, and real-time field decision-making significantly limit displacement potential.
description: En förvaltare inom skogsbruk och lantbruk leder och planerar den dagliga driften av gårdar, skogsegendomar eller lantbruksföretag, vilket inkluderar att organisera sådd, skörd, avverkning, djurskötsel och underhåll av mark och maskiner. Arbetet är i hög grad fysiskt och utförs till stor del utomhus, men innefattar också administrativt arbete med ekonomisk uppföljning, bidragsansökningar och planering via digitala verktyg som Agri, Hansa eller Skogsstyrelsens planeringsverktyg. De använder praktiska redskap och lantbruksmaskiner i fält samtidigt som de hanterar personal, leverantörskontakter och myndighetsrapportering från konto

name: Rektorer, nivå 2
rationale: Headmaster roles combine significant administrative and documentation work (scheduling, budgeting, compliance reporting) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, but the role is fundamentally anchored in physical presence — observing teaching, managing staff conflicts, building school culture, and maintaining relationships with students, parents, and authorities. The leadership, judgment, and accountability dimensions of the role, combined with mandatory on-site responsibilities under Swedish school law, create strong barriers to AI displacement despite meaningful exposure in the administrative components.
description:
## Rektorer, nivå 2 (SSYK 1412)

Rektorer på denna nivå leder och organiserar det dagliga arbetet på en skola eller förskola, vilket innebär personalansvar, pedagogiskt utvecklingsarbete och budget- och resursförvaltning. Arbetet sker till stor del digitalt via administrativa system (exempelvis Skola24, IST eller kommunala HR-system), e-post och digitala möten, men kombineras med fysisk närvaro i verksamheten genom observationer av undervisning, personalmöten och kontakt med elever och vårdnadshavare. En central del av rollen är att säkerställa att verksamheten uppfyller skollagstiftningens krav och läroplanens mål, vilket kräver kontinuerlig dokumentation, uppfö

name: Avdelningschefer inom förskola, nivå 1
rationale: This role combines significant physical presence requirements — direct oversight of preschool units, staff supervision, parent interactions, and on-site management — with administrative tasks like scheduling, documentation, and budget tracking that AI can increasingly assist with or automate. The human leadership, relationship management, and regulatory compliance judgment components create meaningful barriers to full AI substitution, placing it in a moderate exposure range similar to other frontline managers in care/education settings.
description: **Avdelningschefer inom förskola, nivå 1** ansvarar för den operativa ledningen av en eller flera förskoleenheter, vilket innefattar personalansvar, schemaläggning och att säkerställa att verksamheten följer läroplanen (Lpfö 18) och gällande lagstiftning. Det dagliga arbetet innebär möten med pedagogisk personal, hantering av administrativa uppgifter som dokumentation, budgetuppföljning och rapportering – ofta i digitala system som Hypernet, Personec eller kommunspecifika verksamhetssystem. Arbetet är en kombination av fysisk närvaro i verksamheten (t.ex. medarbetarsamtal, tillsyn och samverkan med vårdnadshavare) och digitalt administrativt arbete

name: Avdelningschefer inom socialt och kurativt arbete, nivå 1
name_en: Department managers in social and curative care, level 1
rationale: Department managers in social and curative care combine significant administrative and planning work (schedulable via digital tools, exposing them to AI productivity gains) with essential physical presence, personnel management, and context-sensitive human judgment in care settings. While AI can streamline reporting, documentation, budget tracking, and meeting preparation, the core of the role—leading staff, navigating complex social situations, and maintaining institutional accountability—requires human presence and relational skills that limit full AI substitution.
description: **Avdelningschefer inom socialt och kurativt arbete, nivå 1** leder och samordnar verksamheten inom exempelvis socialtjänst, äldreomsorg eller behandlingsenheter, med ansvar för personal, budget och kvalitetssäkring av insatser. Det dagliga arbetet innebär möten med medarbetare och andra chefer, handläggning av administrativa ärenden, verksamhetsplanering och uppföljning av mål och resultat. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och fysiskt – de använder verksamhetssystem (t.ex. Combine, Pulsen eller liknande journal- och planeringssystem), Office-verktyg och digitala mötesplattformar, men har även regelbunden fysisk närvaro i verksamheten

name: Enhetschefer inom äldreomsorg, nivå 2
name_en: Unit managers in elderly care, level 2
rationale: Unit managers in elderly care combine significant desk-based administrative work (scheduling, HR, budgeting, documentation) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with essential physical presence requirements — supervising staff on the floor, handling acute situations, and maintaining trust-based relationships with residents and families. The irreplaceable human judgment in crisis management, personnel leadership, and empathetic stakeholder communication, combined with regulatory accountability and physical presence demands, provides a substantial barrier to AI displacement despite moderate exposure on the administrative side.
description: **Unit managers in elderly care (level 2)** primarily lead and coordinate daily operations at a residential care home or home care unit, managing staff scheduling, personnel matters, and ensuring that care quality meets legal and regulatory standards. Their work involves a mix of administrative tasks — using digital systems such as **Procapita, TES/Timecare** (for scheduling and staff planning), and electronic health record systems — alongside physical presence on the floor to supervise staff, handle acute situations, and maintain contact with residents and their relatives. The role is roughly split between desk-based digital administration (budgeting, documentation, HR matters) and hands-on leadership in the care environment, with relatively little direct personal care work themselves.

name: Chefer och ledare inom trossamfund
name_en: Managers and leaders within religious bodies
rationale: This role combines significant administrative tasks (budgeting, scheduling, member records) that AI can assist with or partially automate, but the core of the work involves pastoral care, community relationship-building, ceremonial leadership, and spiritual guidance that require deep human presence and trust. The religious and relational dimensions create a strong natural barrier to AI displacement, though administrative efficiency gains may reduce support staff needs over time.
description: Swedish **chefer och ledare inom trossamfund** leder och samordnar den operativa och administrativa verksamheten inom religiösa organisationer, exempelvis kyrkor, moskéer eller församlingar – detta inkluderar personalansvar, budgetarbete och planering av gudstjänster, ceremonier och gemenskapsaktiviteter. I det dagliga arbetet används verktyg som administrativa system för medlemsregister (exempelvis Kyrksam inom Svenska kyrkan), e-post, kalenderverktyg och ekonomiprogram för budgetuppföljning. Arbetet är **blandat** – en betydande del är fysisk och relationsorienterad (möten med personal, volontärer och församlingsmedlemmar, närvaro vid ceremonier och pastorala samtal), men kompletteras av digitalt administrativt arbete.

name: Hotell- och konferenschefer, nivå 1
rationale: Hotel and conference managers at this level combine significant digital work (budget reporting, PMS systems, booking management) with essential physical presence requirements such as facility walkthroughs, on-site staff management, and direct guest interactions that AI cannot easily replicate. While AI can automate scheduling, reporting, and some customer communications, the leadership, relationship management, and operational oversight roles demand human judgment and physical presence, limiting AI exposure to a moderate level.
description: **Hotell- och konferenschef, nivå 1** ansvarar för den övergripande driften av ett hotell eller en konferensanläggning, inklusive personalledning, budgetuppföljning och kvalitetssäkring av gästupplevelsen. Det dagliga arbetet innebär möten med avdelningschefer, hantering av bokningar och kapacitetsplanering via PMS-system (t.ex. Opera eller Mews), samt kontakt med kunder och leverantörer. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt (ekonomirapporter, bokningssystem, e-postkommunikation) och fysiskt (ronder i lokalerna, personalsamtal och gästmöten på plats).

name: Hotell- och konferenschefer, nivå 2
rationale: Hotel and conference managers operate in a hybrid environment where significant portions of their work — scheduling, booking management, financial reporting, and communications — can be augmented or partially automated by AI, but the role requires substantial physical presence, real-time interpersonal interaction with guests and staff, and on-site operational oversight that limits full AI displacement. The leadership, hospitality, and situational judgment components tied to physical spaces create a meaningful barrier, placing this role in the moderate exposure range similar to other service managers.
description:
## Hotell- och konferenschef, nivå 2 (SSYK 1712)

En hotell- och konferenschef på nivå 2 ansvarar för den dagliga driften av ett hotell eller en konferensanläggning, vilket innebär att leda och schemalägga personal, hantera bokningar och kapacitetsplanering samt säkerställa att gäster och konferenskunder får god service. Arbetet sker i ett **blandat digitalt och fysiskt** format – de använder Property Management Systems (PMS) som Opera eller Hotellinx, bokningssystem och ekonomirapportering digitalt, men tillbringar också betydande tid på golvet för att övervaka reception, städning, kök och konferenslokaler. En typisk arbetsdag inkluderar möten med av

name: Chefer inom friskvård, sport och fritid, nivå 2
name_en: Sports, leisure and wellness managers, level 2
rationale: This role combines significant physical presence requirements — managing a gym, pool, or leisure facility with on-site staff and customers — with administrative tasks like scheduling, budgeting, and booking systems that AI can increasingly handle.
