The operational leadership, real-time facility management, and human interaction components create a meaningful barrier to full AI exposure, but the administrative and coordination aspects face moderate automation pressure.
description: En chef inom friskvård, sport och fritid på nivå 2 leder och samordnar verksamheten på en anläggning som ett gym, en simhall eller ett fritidscenter – det innebär personalansvar, schemaläggning, budgetuppföljning och kontakt med kunder eller medlemmar. Det dagliga arbetet kombinerar fysisk närvaro på anläggningen med administrativa uppgifter i digitala system för bokningar, ekonomiuppföljning och personalhantering (exempelvis Visma, Hogia eller branschspecifika bokningssystem). Arbetet är alltså en mix av operativt, platsbaserat ledarskap och digitalt administrativt arbete, där kommunikation via e-post och möten tar upp en betydande del av arbetstiden.

name: Chefer inom övrig servicenäring, nivå 2
name_en: Other services managers not elsewhere classified, level 2
rationale: These managers operate in a hybrid role with significant physical oversight responsibilities — inspecting facilities, handling in-person complaints, and managing staff and equipment — which limits direct AI automation. However, the administrative components (scheduling, invoicing, reporting, budgeting, supplier communication) are increasingly AI-augmentable, and AI tools could reduce the headcount needed to manage these operations, placing this occupation in the moderate exposure range.
description:
## Chefer inom övrig servicenäring, nivå 2 (SSYK 1792)

These managers oversee day-to-day operations within service businesses not captured by more specific categories – such as laundry services, funeral services, pet care, or cleaning companies – coordinating staff schedules, managing supplier contacts, and ensuring service quality standards are met. Their work combines both physical oversight (inspecting facilities, handling customer complaints in person, managing equipment and supplies) and digital administration using tools like scheduling software, email, invoicing systems, and basic CRM or business management platforms. The role is primarily hybrid – grounded in hands-on operational responsibility but with a growing administrative and digital component for reporting, budgeting, and communication.

name: Arbetsmiljöingenjörer, yrkes- och miljöhygieniker
name_en: Environmental and occupational health and hygiene professionals
rationale: This occupation has a significant physical component requiring on-site visits, specialized measurement equipment (noise meters, gas detectors, particle counters, vibration meters), and direct workplace inspections that AI cannot replace. However, the substantial desk-based portion — data analysis, report writing, risk assessments, and compliance documentation — is highly exposed to AI augmentation, which could reduce the number of professionals needed even if field work remains human-dependent.
description: Swedish arbetsmiljöingenjörer och yrkes-/miljöhygieniker arbetar praktiskt med att identifiera, mäta och bedöma risker i arbetsmiljön – såsom buller, kemiska exponeringar, damm, vibrationer och ergonomiska belastningar – ofta genom fysiska besök på arbetsplatser där de utför mätningar med specialiserad utrustning som bullermätare, gasmätare, partikelräknare och vibrationsmätare. De sammanställer sedan mätdata, skriver riskbedömningar och åtgärdsrekommendationer samt tar fram underlag för regelefterlevnad gentemot Arbetsmiljöverkets föreskrifter, vilket innebär ett betydande digitalt inslag i form av rapportskrivning, dataanalys och dokument

name: Specialistläkare
rationale: Specialist physicians have strong natural barriers to AI automation due to the requirement for physical examinations, hands-on procedures (surgery, endoscopies, injections), and direct patient interaction that demand physical presence and tactile skill. However, AI exposure is meaningfully elevated by the substantial digital workload — interpreting imaging, ordering and analyzing lab results, documentation in EHR systems, and clinical decision support — where AI tools are already reshaping productivity and reducing the cognitive burden, making fewer specialists needed for the administrative and diagnostic interpretation components.
description: A Swedish Specialistläkare examines, diagnoses, and treats patients within their specific medical specialty, performing both physical examinations and procedures such as surgery, endoscopies, or injections depending on the field. They work extensively with digital tools including journal systems like **Take Care, Cosmic, or NCS Cross**, ordering lab tests, interpreting imaging (X-ray, CT, MRI), and documenting patient care electronically, while also spending significant time on ward rounds, outpatient consultations, and direct hands-on patient contact. The work is therefore a clear mix of physical and digital — direct patient interaction and clinical procedures form the core, supported by a heavy administrative and documentation burden in digital health record systems.

name: ST-läkare
rationale: Resident physicians have strong physical barriers to AI automation due to hands-on patient examinations, invasive procedures, and direct clinical care requiring physical presence. However, significant AI exposure exists in the documentation-heavy, diagnostic, and administrative components of their work, where AI tools are rapidly augmenting or automating tasks like journal documentation, image interpretation, and differential diagnosis support.
description: En ST-läkare arbetar kliniskt på sjukhus eller vårdcentral under handledning, där de undersöker och bedömer patienter, ställer diagnoser, ordinerar behandlingar och utför medicinska procedurer inom sin specialitet. Arbetet kombinerar fysiska moment – patientundersökningar, provtagningar och eventuella kirurgiska eller invasiva ingrepp – med digitala verktyg som journalsystem (exempelvis Take Care, Cosmic eller NCS Cross), bilddiagnostik och digitala remissystem. En betydande del av arbetsdagen ägnas åt dokumentation i patientjournaler, rond, teamarbete och konsultationer, vilket gör arbetet till en tydlig blandning av fysisk patientkontakt och digitalt administrativt arbete.

name: AT-läkare
rationale: AT-läkare work is heavily grounded in physical presence — hands-on patient examinations, procedures like suturing and venipuncture, and real-time clinical decision-making in diverse hospital settings — which creates strong barriers to direct automation. However, significant portions of their work (EHR documentation, reviewing lab results and imaging, writing referrals, and diagnostic reasoning support) are increasingly augmented or partially automatable by AI, placing them in a moderate exposure range similar to other physicians.
description: An AT-läkare (allmäntjänstgöringsläkare) is a licensed medical graduate completing their mandatory 18-month supervised clinical rotation across different hospital departments and primary care, performing tasks like patient examinations, diagnosing conditions, prescribing medications, and writing medical records. Their work is heavily physical — conducting hands-on assessments, taking patient histories, performing procedures like suturing or venipuncture — but also substantially digital, as they document extensively in electronic health record systems (such as Cosmic, TakeCare, or Millennium) and use digital tools for ordering lab tests, referrals, and reviewing imaging results. The role is supervisory in nature, meaning they work under senior physicians while gradually taking on more independent responsibility across medicine, surgery, psychiatry, and primary care settings.

name: Grundutbildade sjuksköterskor
rationale: Swedish registered nurses perform predominantly hands-on clinical work — administering medications, wound care, catheterization, and blood sampling — that requires physical presence and cannot be automated away, placing a natural ceiling on AI exposure. However, a meaningful portion of their workflow involves digital documentation, clinical decision support, and medication management systems where AI can meaningfully augment or reduce workload, warranting a score slightly above the midpoint for this occupational category.
description: Swedish grundutbildade sjuksköterskor (registered nurses with a bachelor's degree) assess and monitor patients' health status, administer medications, perform wound care, take blood samples, insert catheters, and carry out other clinical procedures in hospitals, primary care, or elderly care settings. They document all care measures and patient observations in digital journal systems such as Take Care, Cosmic, or Millennium, and communicate with physicians and other healthcare staff through these platforms. The work is predominantly physical and hands-on, but digital documentation and medication management systems (e.g., Pascal for prescriptions) are central tools in the daily workflow.

name: Röntgensjuksköterskor
rationale: Radiology nurses have significant physical, hands-on components — patient positioning, contrast agent administration, equipment operation, and direct patient care — that create strong barriers to full automation. However, AI is increasingly automating image acquisition optimization, quality checks, and workflow management through RIS/PACS integration, and may reduce staffing needs over time as imaging processes become more automated and efficient.
description: Swedish röntgensjuksköterskor primarily perform diagnostic imaging examinations such as X-ray, CT, MRI, and mammography, operating advanced radiological equipment and positioning patients correctly to obtain high-quality images. They work in a hybrid physical-digital environment — the hands-on work involves direct patient contact, administering contrast agents, and handling imaging equipment, while image acquisition, processing, and documentation are managed through digital systems such as RIS (Radiology Information System) and PACS (Picture Archiving and Communication System). They also prepare and monitor patients during procedures, follow radiation protection protocols, and collaborate with radiologists who interpret the images.

name: Psykoterapeuter
rationale: Psychotherapy is deeply relational and depends on human empathy, therapeutic alliance, and nuanced emotional attunement that AI cannot currently replicate, creating a strong barrier to full automation. However, AI can assist with documentation, standardized assessments, treatment planning, and even deliver structured CBT protocols (as already seen in digital therapy apps), plus video-based sessions reduce physical presence requirements — moderately elevating exposure.
description: Swedish **Psykoterapeuter** conduct structured therapeutic sessions with patients suffering from psychological conditions such as depression, anxiety, trauma, or relationship difficulties, using evidence-based methods like KBT (kognitiv beteendeterapi), psychodynamic therapy, or EMDR. Their core work involves talking with patients, analyzing behavioral patterns, assigning exercises or homework, and maintaining detailed clinical notes and treatment documentation. The work is predominantly in-person (though video sessions via platforms like Zoom or Region-specific systems have grown), with key tools being clinical journals (often in systems like Journal Digital or Take Care), standardized assessment forms (such as GAD-7 or PHQ-9), and treatment manuals.

name: Grundskollärare
rationale: Primary school teaching is fundamentally grounded in physical presence, real-time relational interaction with children, and social-emotional development that AI cannot replicate, creating a strong natural barrier to direct automation. However, AI significantly impacts the substantial administrative and preparatory workload — lesson planning, grading, writing individual development plans, and parent communication — making teachers meaningfully more productive and potentially reducing demand at the margins.
description: A Swedish grundskollärare plans and delivers lessons in one or more subjects to students typically aged 6–16, using a mix of physical materials (textbooks, worksheets, manipulatives) and digital tools such as interactive whiteboards, learning platforms like Google Classroom or Skolplattformen, and tablets or computers. Daily work includes classroom instruction, assessing and grading student work, documenting progress in digital systems, and communicating with parents through platforms like Unikum or IST. The work is fundamentally in-person and relational, though administrative tasks — writing individual development plans, preparing materials, and reporting — add a significant digital workload outside classroom hours.

name: Speciallärare och specialpedagoger m.fl.
name_en: Special teachers and special needs teachers
rationale: Special teachers work directly with vulnerable students in physical settings, requiring nuanced human judgment, relationship-building, and hands-on support that AI cannot readily replicate — particularly when working with children with disabilities or behavioral challenges. However, significant portions of their work, such as writing action plans, developing adapted materials, conducting documentation, and administrative reporting, are increasingly automatable, creating moderate but not dominant AI exposure.
description: **Special teachers and special needs teachers (speciallärare/specialpedagoger)** primarily work with identifying, assessing, and supporting students who have learning difficulties, disabilities, or other special educational needs, through individual or small-group teaching sessions, observations, and educational assessments. Their daily work involves conducting structured pedagogical investigations (utredningar), developing adapted learning materials, collaborating with classroom teachers and school leadership, and writing action plans (åtgärdsprogram). The work is a mix of physical and digital – they work hands-on with students using concrete materials and printed resources, while also using digital tools such as assistive technology (e.g., speech-to-text software, reading/writing programs like Inläsningstjänsten or Skolstil), documentation systems, and administrative platforms for reporting and planning.

name: Skådespelare
rationale: Acting is fundamentally rooted in physical presence, emotional authenticity, and human embodiment that AI cannot yet replicate for most live and filmed performances, creating a natural barrier to full automation. However, AI poses significant indirect threats through AI-generated synthetic actors, deepfakes, voice cloning, and virtual performers that could reduce demand for human actors in commercial, background, and lower-budget roles, making the profession moderately exposed overall.
description: A Swedish skådespelare portrays characters in film, television, theatre, or radio by using their voice, body, facial expressions, and emotional range as their primary tools. Their daily work involves rehearsing scripts, collaborating with directors and fellow cast members, learning lines, and performing live or in front of cameras and microphones. The work is fundamentally physical and interpersonal, though digital tools such as video call rehearsals, script software, and self-recorded audition tapes have become increasingly common parts of the profession.

name: Övriga yrken inom socialt arbete
name_en: Social work professions not elsewhere classified
rationale: This occupation has meaningful AI exposure in its documentation-heavy components — case notes, reporting, and coordination emails in systems like Treserva or Procapita are prime targets for AI assistance or automation, potentially reducing administrative burden significantly. However, the core work involves direct human contact, home visits, group sessions, and trust-based psychosocial support with vulnerable populations, which presents strong barriers to full AI substitution and anchors the score in the moderate range.
description:
## Övriga yrken inom socialt arbete (SSYK 2669)

Workers in this catch-all category typically handle case coordination, psychosocial support, and administrative follow-up for individuals or families in vulnerable situations — for example within addiction care, refugee reception, or supported housing. Their daily work combines direct client contact (conversations, home visits, group sessions) with significant documentation and reporting in case management systems such as **Treserva, Procapita, or BBIC**. The work is therefore **both physical and digital** — fieldwork and face-to-face interaction dominate client-facing hours, while a substantial portion of time is spent on screen-based record-keeping, coordination emails, and meeting documentation.

name: Ingenjörer och tekniker inom elektroteknik
rationale: Electronics engineering technicians perform largely hands-on, physical work involving on-site fault-finding, signal measurement, and equipment installation that AI cannot directly automate, providing a strong natural barrier to full AI displacement. However, AI tools can meaningfully assist with diagnostics, documentation, configuration tasks, and predictive maintenance analysis, and productivity gains may reduce the number of technicians needed over time.
description: Swedish electronics engineering technicians (SSYK 3113) typically work with installation, testing, troubleshooting and maintenance of electrical and electronic systems and equipment, such as industrial machinery, control systems or telecommunications infrastructure. Their work is largely **hands-on and physical** – measuring signals with instruments like oscilloscopes, multimeters and diagnostic software, reading technical drawings, and performing fault-finding on-site in factories, power facilities or telecom networks. They also handle documentation and configuration tasks digitally, but the core of the role is practical fieldwork rather than pure office or software-based work.

name: Ingenjörer och tekniker inom kemi och kemiteknik
rationale: Chemical engineering technicians work heavily in physical environments — labs, production floors, and process facilities — requiring hands-on operation of equipment like reactors, chromatographs, and distillation columns, which creates a strong barrier to direct automation. However, their digital tasks such as data logging, quality control reporting, LIMS data entry, process monitoring, and routine analysis interpretation are increasingly AI-augmentable, placing them in the moderate exposure range.
description: Swedish chemical engineering technicians (SSYK 3115) primarily work in laboratories, production facilities, or process industries, performing hands-on tasks such as conducting chemical analyses, monitoring and adjusting production processes, and ensuring quality control of materials and products. They work with physical equipment like reactors, distillation columns, chromatographs, and laboratory instruments, while also using digital tools such as process control systems (SCADA/DCS), laboratory information management systems (LIMS), and documentation software. Their work is a blend of physical and digital activity, with significant time spent on the production floor or in labs alongside computer-based monitoring, reporting, and data analysis.

name: Ingenjörer och tekniker inom gruvteknik och metallurgi
rationale: Mining and metallurgical technicians have significant physical presence requirements — inspecting equipment, taking samples, and working in mines and smelters — which creates a natural barrier to full AI automation. However, the monitoring, process optimization, reporting, and control system tasks they perform digitally are increasingly being handled by AI-driven process control and predictive maintenance systems, moderately increasing AI exposure over time.
description: Swedish mining and metallurgical technicians (SSYK 3116) work hands-on in mines, processing plants, and smelters, monitoring and overseeing extraction, ore processing, and metal refining operations on a daily basis. They use a combination of physical instruments, control systems, and SCADA/process control software to measure material quality, adjust equipment parameters, and troubleshoot machinery such as crushers, furnaces, and ventilation systems. Their work is a mix of physical site presence – inspecting equipment, taking samples, and coordinating with operators – and digital monitoring through control room dashboards and reporting tools.

name: Receptarier
rationale: Receptariers combine significant digital information work (retrieving e-prescriptions, checking drug interaction databases, processing transactions) that AI could increasingly assist or automate, but the role is anchored by direct patient-facing counseling, physical medication handling, and the professional liability of verifying prescription appropriateness in real time. AI can augment drug interaction checks and prescription verification, but the in-person patient counseling, regulatory responsibility, and physical dispensing tasks create meaningful barriers to full automation, placing this occupation in a moderate exposure range similar to nurses and pharmacists.
description: A Swedish receptarier works primarily in pharmacy (apotek), where their main tasks involve dispensing prescription medications, counseling patients on correct drug use, dosage, and potential interactions, and verifying that prescriptions are medically appropriate. The work combines physical handling of medications with digital tools — they use pharmacy systems such as Expeditionsystemet (e.g., Apotekens Service IT-system and journal databases) to retrieve electronic prescriptions (e-recept), check patient medication histories, and process transactions. The role is thus a mix of digital information work and direct patient-facing service, with a strong element of pharmaceutical expertise applied in practical, everyday customer interactions.

name: Brandingenjörer och byggnadsinspektörer m.fl.
rationale: Fire and building inspectors require mandatory physical site visits to assess structural integrity, fire safety systems, and code compliance — tasks that cannot be fully automated due to the need for on-site judgment and hands-on evaluation. However, the significant administrative components (report writing, documentation, code lookups, case management) are highly exposed to AI assistance, and AI-powered imaging/sensor analysis could eventually reduce the frequency of human inspections.
description: **Brandingenjörer och byggnadsinspektörer** inspekterar byggnader, konstruktioner och brandskyddsinstallationer för att säkerställa att de uppfyller gällande lagar, byggkoder och säkerhetsföreskrifter – arbetet sker primärt på plats ute i fält genom fysiska besiktningar. De använder verktyg som måttband, fuktmätare, ritningar och checklistor, samt digitala system för att dokumentera avvikelser, skriva inspektionsrapporter och hantera ärenden i kommunala eller statliga ärendehanteringssystem. Arbetet är en kombination av fysiskt fältarbete (platsbesök, provtryckning av brandlarm, granskning av utrymningsvägar) och administrativt datorarbete

name: Arbetsledare inom lager och terminal
rationale: Warehouse and terminal supervisors have significant physical presence requirements — floor supervision, coordination of manual labor, and real-time logistics management create natural barriers to full AI automation. However, AI will increasingly handle scheduling optimization, WMS data analysis, inventory tracking, and route coordination, reducing the cognitive and administrative load and potentially allowing fewer supervisors to manage larger operations.
description: A warehouse and terminal supervisor in Sweden primarily oversees the daily flow of goods through a logistics facility — coordinating staff, assigning picking, packing, loading, and unloading tasks, and ensuring that deadlines and delivery schedules are met. The work is a mix of physical presence on the warehouse floor and digital administration, using warehouse management systems (WMS) such as SAP, Ongoing, or similar software to track inventory, register incoming and outgoing shipments, and monitor order status. They regularly communicate with truck drivers, carriers, and other departments, and are responsible for safety routines, staff scheduling, and making sure procedures follow internal standards and regulations.

name: Förtroendevalda
rationale: Elected representatives perform a mix of document review, communication, and meeting participation that AI can assist with significantly, but their core function — exercising democratic judgment, building political coalitions, and representing constituents — requires human accountability, trust, and legitimacy that AI cannot replace. The role involves substantial physical presence, negotiation, and interpersonal relationship-building, which creates meaningful barriers to full automation, though AI tools can boost individual productivity in the administrative and research aspects of the work.
description:
## Förtroendevalda (SSYK 4430)

Förtroendevalda representerar medlemmar eller medborgare inom fackföreningar, politiska organ eller andra demokratiska organisationer, och deltar i möten, förhandlingar och beslutsfattande processer. Deras dagliga arbete innefattar att läsa och granska underlag, delta i sammanträden, föra protokoll samt kommunicera med medlemmar via e-post, telefon och digitala plattformar som Teams eller medlemssystem. Arbetet är en blandning av digitalt (dokumenthantering, e-postkommunikation, digitala möten) och fysiskt (personliga möten, förhandlingar, studiebesök), där uppdraget ofta utförs parallellt med ett ordinarie yrke på deltidsbasis.

name: Processoperatörer, papper
rationale: Papermaking plant operators work from centralized control rooms using DCS/SCADA systems, making the monitoring and optimization aspects increasingly automatable by AI, which can already handle process control, anomaly detection, and parameter adjustments. However, the role requires regular physical presence on the plant floor for inspections, manual valve adjustments, and hands-on troubleshooting of equipment, creating a significant barrier to full AI displacement.
description: **Processoperatör, papper** övervakar och styr tillverkningsprocessen i pappers- och massabruk, vilket innefattar att kontrollera råvaruflöden, kemikaliedoseringar, malningstider och torkning av pappersmassan. Arbetet sker till stor del från en central kontrollrum där de använder datoriserade styrsystem (DCS/SCADA) för att övervaka mätinstrument, larm och processvärden i realtid. Det är alltså en kombination av digitalt processövervakning och fysiskt arbete, eftersom operatören även gör rundor i produktionsanläggningen för att inspektera maskiner, justera ventiler och åtgärda enklare driftstörningar.

name: Drifttekniker vid värme- och vattenverk
name_en: Power production and water treatment plant operators
rationale: This role combines significant digital/monitoring work (SCADA systems, alarm handling, process control) that AI can increasingly automate or augment, with essential physical presence requirements such as facility rounds, manual inspections of pumps/valves/boilers, water sampling, and hands-on maintenance that resist full automation. The physical plant oversight, fault diagnosis in dynamic environments, and safety-critical responsibilities create a meaningful barrier to AI displacement, placing it in a moderate exposure range similar to other technical operator roles.
description: En drifttekniker vid värme- och vattenverk övervakar och styr produktionsprocesser för fjärrvärme, kraftvärme eller dricksvattenrening – ofta via SCADA-system och digitala kontrollpaneler i ett kontrollrum, men också genom regelbundna fysiska ronder i anläggningen för att kontrollera pumpar, ventiler, pannor, filter och mätutrustning. Arbetet innebär att justera driftparametrar, felsöka och åtgärda driftstörningar, ta vattenprover och dokumentera mätvärden samt utföra enklare underhåll på mekanisk och elektrisk utrustning. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt (processövervakning, larmhantering, loggning) och fys

name: Restaurang- och kökschefer, nivå 1
rationale: Restaurant managers at this level work primarily in physical, on-site environments requiring constant presence in kitchens and dining areas, managing staff face-to-face, handling deliveries, and enforcing hygiene standards — all strong barriers to AI automation. While AI can assist with scheduling, inventory management, budgeting, and booking systems, the core role demands real-time human judgment, physical oversight, and interpersonal leadership that cannot be fully replicated or made redundant by AI tools.
description: **Swedish Restaurang- och kökschefer, nivå 1** ansvarar för den övergripande driften av en restaurang eller storkök, inklusive personalledning, schemaläggning, budgetering och kvalitetskontroll av mat och service. Det dagliga arbetet är primärt **fysiskt och platsbaserat** – de rör sig i köket och matsalen, hanterar leveranser, kontrollerar råvaror och säkerställer att hygien- och säkerhetsstandarder följs (HACCP). Digitala verktyg används som komplement, exempelvis kassasystem (POS), bokningssystem, personaladministrationsprogram och enklare ekonomiprogram för kostnadsuppföljning.

name: Restaurang- och kökschefer, nivå 2
rationale: Restaurant managers at this level work primarily in physical environments — on the floor, in the kitchen, managing staff and service in real time — which creates a strong natural barrier to AI automation. While AI tools can assist with scheduling, inventory management, cost tracking, and menu optimization, the core of the job involves hands-on oversight, human coordination, and physical presence that significantly limits overall AI exposure.
description: **Swedish Restaurang- och kökschefer, nivå 2 (SSYK 1722)** plan and coordinate the daily operations of a restaurant or kitchen, including scheduling staff, ordering supplies, managing budgets, and ensuring food quality and safety standards (HACCP) are met. Their work is largely **physical and hands-on** – they spend time on the restaurant floor and in the kitchen overseeing service, handling ingredients and equipment, and stepping in during busy periods. They also use digital tools such as POS systems, booking platforms, inventory management software, and basic office applications for administrative tasks like cost tracking and staff scheduling.

name: Psykiatrisjuksköterskor
rationale: Psychiatric nurses require substantial physical presence for medication administration, crisis intervention, vital signs monitoring, and therapeutic alliance-building — core functions that AI cannot replicate. However, the administrative and documentation components (EHR charting, care plan coordination, structured clinical interviews) face moderate AI exposure, pulling the score slightly above purely hands-on clinical roles.
description: Swedish psychiatric nurses (**psykiatrisjuksköterskor**) assess and monitor patients' mental health status, administer medications (including depot injections), conduct structured clinical interviews, and coordinate care plans in collaboration with psychiatrists, social workers, and other team members. Their work involves both direct physical patient contact – such as hands-on crisis intervention, physical health checks (vital signs, blood samples), and motivational conversations – and digital documentation in electronic health record systems like **Cosmic, Journal III, or PMO**. The role is thus a mix of relational/physical work and administrative digital work, with a strong emphasis on therapeutic alliance and continuity of care, often in outpatient or community psychiatry settings.

name: Geriatriksjuksköterskor
rationale: Geriatric nurses perform highly physical, patient-facing work including medication administration, wound care, and hands-on assessment of elderly patients with complex conditions, creating strong barriers to direct AI automation. However, the significant documentation and clinical decision-support components (EHR systems, care coordination, medication management) are increasingly AI-assisted, and AI could reduce administrative burden and improve diagnostic accuracy, though the core caregiving role remains deeply human and physically present.
description: **Geriatriksjuksköterskor** arbetar med vård och behandling av äldre patienter med ofta komplexa, samtidiga sjukdomstillstånd – de bedömer hälsotillstånd, administrerar läkemedel, sköter sårbehandling och koordinerar vård i nära samarbete med läkare, undersköterskor och andra professioner. Arbetet är övervägande **fysiskt och patientnära** – det innebär mycket direktkontakt med patienter som kan ha nedsatt rörlighet, kognitiv svikt eller multisjuklighet – men innefattar också ett betydande **digitalt inslag** genom journalföring och dokumentation i system som Cosmic, Take Care eller Procapita. De använder medicinska hjälpmedel som blodtryck

name: Barnsjuksköterskor
rationale: Pediatric nurses perform highly physical, patient-facing work — administering medications, drawing samples, wound care, and monitoring critically ill children — that fundamentally cannot be automated by AI. While AI can assist with documentation, diagnostic support, and administrative tasks, the hands-on clinical care and emotional reassurance required with vulnerable child patients creates a strong barrier to AI displacement.
description: **Barnsjuksköterskor** arbetar med att bedöma, övervaka och vårda sjuka barn och ungdomar på sjukhusavdelningar, barnmottagningar eller neonatalavdelningar, och utför praktiska uppgifter som provtagning, sårvård, medicinering och infusionsbehandlingar. De använder medicinska instrument som stetoskop, infusionspumpar och övervakningsutrustning samt dokumenterar löpande i digitala journalsystem (exempelvis Cosmic eller Take Care). Arbetet är till sin natur övervägande **fysiskt och patientnära**, men innefattar ett betydande inslag av digital dokumentation och kommunikation med övrig vårdpersonal.

name: Företagssköterskor
rationale: Occupational health nurses perform largely hands-on clinical tasks — audiometry, blood pressure checks, vaccinations, ergonomic workplace assessments — that require physical presence and cannot be automated by AI. However, their documentation, health risk assessments, counseling support, and coordination tasks have moderate AI exposure, raising the score above the baseline for purely physical roles.
description: **Företagssköterskor (Occupational Health Nurses)** work primarily within occupational health services (*företagshälsovård*), conducting health assessments, medical screenings, and rehabilitation planning for employees at client companies. Their daily work is largely **physical and hands-on** – performing vision tests, blood pressure measurements, hearing tests (audiometry), ergonomic assessments in workplaces, and administering vaccinations – alongside counseling employees on work-related health issues and stress. They also handle **digital documentation** in electronic health record systems (such as Adela or Järven), coordinate with employers and rehabilitation chains, and may conduct workplace visits to assess physical and psychosocial work environments.

name: Övriga specialistsjuksköterskor
rationale: Specialist nurses in oncology, orthopedics, urology, and similar fields perform highly physical, patient-facing work including chemotherapy administration, stoma care, and pain management that requires hands-on clinical skills and real-time human presence, creating strong barriers to direct automation. However, AI will meaningfully impact the documentation, treatment planning support, medication management, and coordination tasks embedded in their workflow, modestly increasing productivity and potentially reducing staffing needs at the margins.
description: **Övriga specialistsjuksköterskor (SSYK 2239)** omfattar specialistsjuksköterskor inom områden som onkologi, ortopedi, urologi eller andra medicinska specialiteter som inte faller under de stora separata kategorierna. I det dagliga arbetet utför de avancerade kliniska bedömningar, administrerar specialiserade behandlingar (t.ex. cytostatikabehandling, stomivård eller smärtlindring), handleder patienter och anhöriga samt samordnar vård inom det egna specialistområdet. Arbetet är övervägande **fysiskt och patientnära** men innehåller även ett betydande digitalt inslag genom dokumentation i journalsystem som Cosmic eller Take Care, läkemedelshantering via digitala ordinationssystem och kommunikation med

name: Veterinärer
rationale: Veterinarians perform highly physical, hands-on work involving animal examination, surgery, and treatment that cannot be automated, creating a strong barrier to direct AI displacement. However, AI can meaningfully assist with diagnostic imaging interpretation, administrative documentation, treatment recommendations, and telemedicine consultations, moderately increasing individual productivity without eliminating the core physical role.
description: Swedish veterinarians primarily perform physical, hands-on work examining, diagnosing, and treating sick or injured animals – both companion animals in clinics and livestock in agricultural settings. They use medical instruments such as stethoscopes, surgical tools, ultrasound and X-ray equipment, and laboratory diagnostics to assess animal health, perform operations, and prescribe medications. Administrative tasks like journaling, writing referrals, and communicating with animal owners are handled digitally through veterinary record systems (such as Trovet or Journal Digital), but the core of the work is decidedly physical and practical.

name: Arbetsterapeuter
rationale: Occupational therapists work primarily in physical, hands-on settings — conducting in-person assessments, prescribing and fitting assistive devices, training patients in their homes or clinics — which creates a strong barrier to direct AI automation. However, AI can assist with documentation, standardized assessment scoring, and treatment planning recommendations, moderately increasing productivity but not replacing the core physical and relational aspects of the role.
description: **Arbetsterapeuter** utreder och bedömer patienters förmåga att klara vardagliga aktiviteter – som personlig vård, matlagning eller arbete – ofta genom standardiserade bedömningsinstrument som AMPS, ADL-taxonomin eller Canadian Occupational Performance Measure (COPM). De förskriver hjälpmedel (exempelvis rollator, duschstol eller kognitiva hjälpmedel), genomför bostadsanpassningar och tränar patienter i kompensatoriska strategier, vilket innebär att arbetet är övervägande **fysiskt och praktiskt** ute hos patienter, på kliniker eller i hemmet. Dokumentation sker digitalt i journalsystem som Cosmic eller TakeCare, men kärnan i arbetet är direkt mänsklig intera

name: Audionomer och logopeder
rationale: Audiologists and speech therapists require significant hands-on patient interaction, physical assessment techniques, and real-time therapeutic exercises that are difficult to automate, providing a strong barrier to full AI displacement. However, AI can assist with hearing aid programming, diagnostic analysis, documentation, and some remote therapy delivery, creating moderate indirect exposure that slightly elevates the score above purely manual occupations.
description: Swedish audiologists and speech therapists assess, diagnose, and treat patients with hearing impairments, speech disorders, language difficulties, or swallowing problems, working in hospitals, primary care, or schools. Audiologists use specialized equipment such as audiometers, hearing aids, and fitting software to measure hearing ability and program hearing devices, while speech therapists work hands-on with patients through structured exercises, conversation, and materials targeting articulation, language comprehension, or swallowing function. The work combines physical patient interaction with digital tools for documentation in medical record systems (such as Take Care or Cosmic) and for calibrating and programming hearing aids.

name: Optiker
rationale: Opticians require significant physical presence for hands-on eye examinations, precise facial measurements, lens grinding, and fitting eyewear directly on patients, creating strong barriers to full AI automation. However, AI is increasingly capable of assisting with refraction determination, diagnostic image analysis (OCT), and digital record management, which could reduce the number of opticians needed or shift their role toward more complex cases.
description: En svensk optiker undersöker patienters syn genom refraktionsbestämning och använder instrument som synstavlar, foropter och spallampa för att diagnostisera brytningsfel och ögonsjukdomar. De anpassar och förskriver glasögon och kontaktlinser, tar mått på ansiktet och sliper linser med hjälp av fysiska verktyg som pupillomätare och slipmaskin. Arbetet är till övervägande del fysiskt och patientnära, men innefattar även digitala journalsystem och modern diagnostisk utrustning som digitala refraktionssystem och OCT-kameror.

name: Övriga specialister inom hälso- och sjukvård
rationale: These health professionals (orthoptists, audiologists, dietitians, medical technology specialists) perform hands-on patient assessments, physical rehabilitation, and specialized treatments requiring direct patient contact, specialized equipment, and clinical judgment in real-world settings — creating strong barriers to direct automation. However, AI can assist with documentation, diagnostic support, nutritional analysis, and some telehealth consultations, creating moderate indirect exposure that slightly elevates the score above purely manual occupations.
description: **Övriga specialister inom hälso- och sjukvård (SSYK 2289)** omfattar yrkesgrupper som inte passar in i mer specifika kategorier, exempelvis ortoptister, audionomer, dietister eller medicintekniska specialister. I det dagliga arbetet utför de patientutredningar, behandlingar och rådgivning inom sitt specialistområde – till exempel synträning, hörselrehabilitering eller nutritionsbedömningar – med hjälp av specialiserad medicinsk utrustning, mätinstrument och journalsystem. Arbetet är övervägande **fysiskt och patientnära**, men innefattar även ett digitalt inslag genom dokumentation i elektroniska patientjournaler (EPJ) och ibland digitala vårdmöten.

name: Lärare i yrkesämnen
rationale: Vocational education teachers are heavily anchored in physical workshop environments where hands-on demonstration of trade skills — welding, patient care techniques, engine repair — cannot be replicated by AI. While AI can assist with lesson planning, assessment documentation, and some theoretical content delivery, the core value of the role lies in embodied expertise and real-time physical instruction, creating a strong natural barrier to AI displacement.
description: Vocational education teachers in Sweden plan and deliver practical and theoretical instruction within a specific trade or industry, such as construction, healthcare, vehicle mechanics, or culinary arts, adapting their teaching to both workshop environments and classroom settings. Their daily work involves demonstrating hands-on techniques using profession-specific tools and equipment — such as welding gear, medical training aids, or industrial machinery — while also preparing lesson materials, assessing student performance, and maintaining documentation in digital school platforms like Skolplattformen or similar systems. The work is a clear mix of physical and digital, with a strong emphasis on practical, hands-on instruction in workshops or labs, complemented by administrative tasks handled digitally.

name: Kuratorer
rationale: The core of this role — building trust, conducting psychosocial assessments, and providing relational support in face-to-face conversations — is deeply human and difficult to automate, creating a strong natural barrier to AI replacement. However, the administrative component (documentation in case management systems, inter-agency communication, and structured needs assessments) is increasingly AI-assisted, improving individual productivity and slightly reducing headcount needs over time.
description: Swedish kuratorer work primarily with psychosocial support and counselling, conducting individual conversations and assessments with clients facing personal, social, or emotional difficulties – for example within schools, hospitals, or social services. Their daily work involves structured interviews, needs assessments, documentation in case management systems (such as Procapita, Lifecare, or school-specific platforms), and coordination with other professionals like psychologists, teachers, or medical staff. The work is a mix of physical face-to-face meetings and digital administration, with documentation and inter-agency communication increasingly handled digitally, while the core support work remains relational and in-person.

name: Arbetsledare inom tillverkning
rationale: Manufacturing supervisors work predominantly on the factory floor with physical presence, real-time personnel management, and hands-on problem-solving that AI cannot easily automate. However, their administrative tasks like scheduling, production planning, and reporting are increasingly AI-augmented, and AI-driven MES/ERP systems may reduce the coordination overhead that justifies supervisory headcount.
description: En arbetsledare inom tillverkning ansvarar för att planera, fördela och följa upp arbetsuppgifter på produktionsgolvet, samt säkerställa att tillverkningen löper enligt tidplan, kvalitetskrav och säkerhetsregler. De arbetar nära produktionsmedarbetarna och hanterar dagliga driftsproblem, schemaläggning och personalfrågor, ofta med stöd av digitala verktyg som produktionsplaneringssystem (MES/ERP), tidrapporteringssystem och ibland Excel. Arbetet är övervägande fysiskt och platsbundet – de rör sig på fabriksgolvet – men innefattar även administrativa moment vid dator, vilket gör det till en kombination av praktiskt ledarskap och enklare digital administration.

name: Tekniker, bilddiagnostik och medicinteknisk utrustning
name_en: Medical imaging and therapeutic equipment technicians
rationale: This role is fundamentally hands-on, requiring physical presence at hospitals to install, calibrate, and repair complex medical hardware like MRI machines and radiation therapy systems, which creates a strong barrier to direct AI automation. However, AI can assist with predictive maintenance diagnostics, fault detection through sensor data analysis, and documentation, moderately increasing individual technician productivity but not eliminating the need for physical intervention.
description: En tekniker inom bilddiagnostik och medicinteknisk utrustning installerar, kalibrerar, underhåller och felsöker medicinsk utrustning som röntgenapparater, MR-kameror, ultraljudsutrustning och strålningsterapisystem. Arbetet är utpräglat fysiskt hands-on – de arbetar direkt med den mekaniska och elektroniska hårdvaran på sjukhus och vårdenheter – men innefattar även digitala inslag som mjukvaruuppdateringar, datorbaserad diagnostik och dokumentation i underhållssystem. Vanliga verktyg inkluderar mätinstrument som oscilloskop och multimetrar, specialiserad kalibreringsutrustning samt tillverkarspecifik servicemjukvara

name: Laboratorieingenjörer
rationale: Laboratory technicians have significant physical barriers to AI exposure — their core work involves hands-on sample preparation, operating instruments like HPLC and spectrophotometers, and physical chemical manipulation that cannot be done remotely or automated cheaply at scale. However, AI is increasingly able to assist with data analysis, result interpretation, documentation in LIMS, and instrument optimization, creating moderate indirect exposure that nudges the score above the purely manual trades.
description: **Laboratorieingenjörer** arbetar huvudsakligen praktiskt i laboratoriemiljö där de utför kemiska och fysikaliska analyser, provtagningar och mätningar på material, produkter eller prover – exempelvis inom läkemedelsindustri, livsmedelskontroll, miljöövervakning eller materialforskning. De använder instrument som spektrometrar, kromatografer (HPLC, GC), mikroskop och titreringsutrustning, och hanterar kemikalier, reagenser och provberedning hands-on dagligen. Arbetet är övervägande **fysiskt/laborativt**, men innehåller också ett digitalt inslag i form av datainsamling, kalibrering av instrument via mjukvara samt dokumentation och rapportering av analysresultat i LIMS (

name: Säkerhetsinspektörer m.fl.
rationale: Safety and quality inspectors must physically visit workplaces, facilities, and equipment to perform hands-on inspections, which creates a strong barrier to direct automation by AI. However, AI can significantly assist with the administrative portions of the role — drafting reports, analyzing compliance documentation, and flagging risks — offering moderate indirect exposure through productivity enhancement.
description: **Säkerhetsinspektörer** genomför kontroller och tillsynsbesök på arbetsplatser, anläggningar eller hos företag för att säkerställa att lagar, förordningar och säkerhetsstandarder efterlevs – exempelvis inom arbetsmiljö, brandskydd, livsmedel eller transport. Arbetet är till stor del fysiskt och platsbaserat, där de inspekterar lokaler, maskiner, processer och dokumentation på plats, ofta med checklistor, mätinstrument och kamera som verktyg. Den administrativa delen – att skriva inspektionsrapporter, förelägganden och beslut – hanteras digitalt i ärendehanteringssystem, men kärnan i arbetet sker ute i fält.

name: Pastorer m.fl.
rationale: Religious associate professionals work is deeply rooted in human presence, emotional support, spiritual guidance, and ceremonial rituals that require authentic interpersonal connection — creating strong barriers to AI automation. However, AI can assist with sermon preparation, administrative tasks, content creation for social media, and study group materials, creating moderate indirect exposure through productivity enhancement.
description: Swedish **Pastorer m.fl. (SSYK 3412)** arbetar främst med att leda gudstjänster, hålla predikningar, utföra själavård och stödja församlingsmedlemmar i andliga och existentiella frågor. De genomför ceremonier som dop, vigslar och begravningar, bedriver studiegrupper och undervisning samt koordinerar volontärarbete och sociala insatser inom församlingen. Arbetet är till övervägande del fysiskt och relationsinriktat – ansikte mot ansikte med människor – men digitala verktyg som e-post, sociala medier och presentationsprogram används alltmer för kommunikation, predikationsförberedelse och att nå ut till församlingen online.

name: Övriga yrken inom kultur och underhållning
name_en: Artistic and cultural associate professionals not elsewhere classified
rationale: This catch-all category encompasses highly physical and interpersonal roles — circus performers, tattoo artists, cultural guides — where embodied skill, live presence, and direct human interaction create strong barriers to AI automation. While administrative, promotional, and coordination tasks within these roles face meaningful AI exposure, the core value-generating activities are resistant to replacement, keeping the overall score relatively low.
description:
## Övriga yrken inom kultur och underhållning (SSYK 3439)

Workers in this catch-all category perform supporting and semi-professional roles in cultural and entertainment settings that don't fit neatly elsewhere — such as **cultural guides, entertainment hosts, circus performers, tattoo artists, or cultural program coordinators**. Their daily work typically involves direct interaction with audiences or clients, preparing and delivering performances, experiences, or creative services, using a mix of physical tools (stage equipment, body art instruments, props) and digital tools (booking systems, social media for promotion, audio/visual equipment). The work is **predominantly physical and interpersonal** in nature, though administrative and promotional tasks add a digital component to most roles in this group.

name: Övriga utbildare och instruktörer
rationale: This occupation involves hands-on, practical instruction in physical environments (driving, safety training, vocational skills), requiring physical presence, demonstration of techniques, and real-time human interaction — all significant barriers to AI automation. While AI can assist with curriculum planning, e-learning content, and administrative tasks, the core delivery is inherently physical and interpersonal, limiting AI exposure compared to desk-based professions.
description: En övrig utbildare och instruktör planerar och genomför praktisk utbildning och instruktion inom områden som inte faller under mer specialiserade läraryrken, exempelvis yrkesträning, säkerhetsutbildning, körundervisning eller studiehandledning. Arbetet är ofta hands-on och fysiskt förankrat – man demonstrerar tekniker, handleder deltagare i verkliga eller simulerade miljöer och använder material som manualer, utrustning och demonstrationsverktyg. Digitala hjälpmedel som presentationsprogram, lärplattformar och e-learning-verktyg förekommer men arbetet är övervägande praktiskt och personligt mötesinriktat.

name: Lager- och terminalpersonal
rationale: Warehouse and terminal staff perform highly physical work involving moving goods, operating forklifts, and navigating large spaces, creating a natural barrier to direct AI automation of the actual tasks. However, significant indirect exposure exists through warehouse robotics (e.g., Amazon-style automated picking systems), AI-driven WMS optimization, and autonomous guided vehicles that are increasingly replacing or reducing the need for human workers in modern fulfillment centers.
description: **Lager- och terminalpersonal** hanterar fysiskt gods genom att ta emot, sortera, plocka och packa varor samt lasta och lossa fordon, ofta med hjälp av truckar, plockvagnar, streckkodsläsare och transportband. Arbetet styrs vanligtvis av ett lagerstyrningssystem (WMS) via handdatorer eller terminaler, men själva arbetsutförandet är till övervägande del fysiskt och rörligt. En stor del av dagen består av att förflytta sig i lagerlokalen, hantera pallgods och säkerställa att rätt varor finns på rätt plats i rätt tid.

name: Säljande butikschefer och avdelningschefer i butik
name_en: Shopkeepers and shop supervisors, selling in stores
rationale: This role is heavily anchored in physical retail environments, requiring in-person customer interaction, hands-on merchandise handling, staff supervision on the shop floor, and real-time problem-solving — all of which create strong barriers to direct AI automation. While AI can assist with inventory management, scheduling, pricing, and demand forecasting (increasing efficiency and potentially reducing headcount), the core daily responsibilities remain dependent on physical presence and interpersonal skills.
description:
**Swedish Säljande butikschefer och avdelningschefer i butik (SSYK 5221)**

These workers manage and staff retail stores or departments while also actively serving customers on the shop floor, handling tasks like ordering and receiving merchandise, pricing goods, arranging displays, and overseeing daily cash handling and inventory. They use a mix of physical and digital tools — including point-of-sale systems, inventory management software, and ordering platforms — while spending the majority of their working time in a physical retail environment rather than at a desk. A significant part of the role involves coaching and scheduling staff, resolving customer issues, and ensuring sales targets and store standards are met on a day-to-day basis.

name: Butikssäljare, fackhandel
rationale: Specialty retail sales requires significant physical presence for product demonstrations, stocking shelves, and in-person customer interaction, which limits direct AI automation. However, AI does pose indirect pressure through e-commerce growth, self-checkout systems, and AI-powered product recommendation engines that reduce the need for in-store advisory staff.
description: A Butikssäljare inom fackhandel arbetar främst fysiskt i en specialiserad butik – exempelvis inom elektronik, sport, byggvaror eller mode – där de hjälper kunder att hitta rätt produkt genom rådgivning och produktdemonstrationer. De hanterar kassan (ofta via digitala kassasystem som Sitoo eller Extenda), plockar och exponerar varor, fyller på hyllor och säkerställer att butiken är välordnad och korrekt prissatt. Arbetet är till övervägande del fysiskt och kundnära, men inslag av digitala verktyg förekommer som lagerhanteringssystem, betalterminaler och ibland enklare orderhantering online.

name: Maskinställare och maskinoperatörer, metallarbete
rationale: Machine-tool operators work primarily in physical environments requiring hands-on setup, fixture mounting, measurement with physical gauges, and real-time adjustment of machinery — strong barriers to direct AI automation. However, AI and advanced robotics/automation do pose moderate indirect exposure, particularly as CNC programming can increasingly be AI-assisted and robotic loading/unloading systems reduce the need for human operators, though full replacement of skilled setup work remains distant.
description: En maskinställare och maskinoperatör inom metallarbete ställer in, programmerar och övervakar maskiner som svarvar, fräsar, borrar eller slipar metalldetaljer enligt ritningar och toleranskrav. Arbetet är till övervägande del fysiskt och hands-on – de monterar verktyg och fixturer, mäter detaljer med skjutmått och mikrometer, och justerar maskininställningar för att hålla rätt dimensioner. Moderna operatörer arbetar ofta med CNC-styrda maskiner, vilket innebär ett visst digitalt inslag i form av att läsa av och ibland modifiera NC-program, men tyngdpunkten ligger fortfarande i det praktiska handhavandet av maskiner och kvalitetskontroll av fysiska detaljer.

name: Tryckare
rationale: Printers work primarily in a physical environment operating and calibrating large industrial printing machines, which requires hands-on skill and physical presence that limits direct AI automation. However, digital prepress workflows, color management, and file handling are increasingly automated, and the broader printing industry faces structural decline from digital media, meaning AI indirectly reduces demand for these workers over time.
description: En tryckare arbetar med att ställa in och köra tryckmaskiner – oftast offset-, digital- eller flexotryckmaskiner – för att producera trycksaker som tidningar, förpackningar, reklamtryck eller böcker. Det dagliga arbetet inkluderar att förbereda och kalibrera maskiner, blanda och kontrollera färger, övervaka tryckkvaliteten under körning samt åtgärda tekniska fel. Arbetet är till stor del fysiskt och maskinbaserat, men innehåller även digitala inslag som att hantera tryckfiler, styrsystem och färghanteringsprogram (RIP-system).

name: Processoperatörer, pappersmassa
rationale: Paper pulp plant operators work in a physical industrial environment requiring regular factory rounds, hands-on equipment inspection, manual sampling, and response to real-time process disturbances, creating strong barriers to full AI automation. While AI can enhance the digital monitoring and control aspects (DCS/SCADA optimization, predictive maintenance, anomaly detection), the physical presence, sensory judgment in harsh conditions, and manual intervention requirements significantly limit overall AI exposure.
description: **Processoperatör, pappersmassa** övervakar och styr produktionsprocessen vid framställning av pappersmassa, vilket innebär att de kontrollerar kokning, blekning och siktning av träflis eller returpapper. Arbetet utförs till stor del från ett kontrollrum där de använder digitala styrsystem (DCS/SCADA) för att övervaka temperatur, trycknivåer och kemikaliedoseringar, men de gör också regelbundna rundor i fabriken för att inspektera utrustning, ta manuella prover och åtgärda enklare driftstörningar. Arbetet är alltså en kombination av digitalt processövervakning och fysiskt arbete i en industriell miljö med buller, kemikalier och tung processutrust

name: Fordonsmontörer
rationale: Vehicle assembly is fundamentally a physical, manual occupation requiring dexterity, spatial awareness, and hands-on manipulation of heavy components on a production line, creating a strong natural barrier to direct AI automation. However, increasing robotization and AI-driven automation in automotive manufacturing does indirectly reduce the workforce needed over time, and some monitoring/quality-control tasks are being digitized, warranting a moderate-low exposure score.
description: **Fordonsmontörer** arbetar med att montera ihop fordonskomponenter och delsystem – som motorer, växellådor, karosserier och bromssystem – på löpande band eller i stationära monteringsstationer. De använder handverktyg som momentnycklar och skruvdragare, samt pneumatiska och elektriska verktyg, lyftanordningar och ibland robotassisterade monteringssystem. Arbetet är övervägande **fysiskt och manuellt**, men innefattar även inslag av digital övervakning, till exempel att avläsa monteringsinstruktioner på skärmar och registrera kvalitetskontroller i datoriserade system.

name: Taxiförare m.fl.
rationale: Taxi and van drivers require physical presence, manual driving skill, and real-time navigation, which currently limits direct AI automation — though self-driving vehicle technology poses a significant long-term threat that is still not fully deployed at scale. The booking and dispatch functions are already heavily automated via apps, and autonomous vehicle development means this occupation faces higher future exposure than most physical jobs, but remains protected for now by regulatory and technological barriers to full driverless deployment.
description: **Taxiförare m.fl.** transporterar passagerare eller gods med personbil, taxi eller mindre skåpbil enligt beställningar eller upphämtningar. De navigerar med hjälp av GPS och digitala bokningssystem (ofta via app eller dispatcher-central), hanterar betalningar via kortterminaler eller digitala plattformar, och ansvarar för fordonets skick och trafiksäkerhet. Arbetet är primärt fysiskt och praktiskt – man sitter bakom ratten större delen av dagen – men med ett tydligt inslag av digital kommunikation och administrativa verktyg för bokningar och rapportering.

name: Politiker
rationale: While AI can significantly assist legislators with research, drafting documents, analyzing policy impacts, and summarizing reports, the core of the job — building coalitions, representing constituents, exercising political judgment, debating, and voting — requires human presence, trust, and democratic legitimacy that AI cannot replace. The role is deeply embedded in physical meetings, public accountability, and interpersonal negotiation, creating strong structural barriers to AI substitution despite moderate productivity gains from AI-assisted document work.
description: En svensk politiker på kommunal, regional eller nationell nivå arbetar huvudsakligen med att delta i debatter, utskottsmöten och omröstningar, samt att bereda och besluta om lagar, budgetar och policyfrågor. Det dagliga arbetet är en blandning av digitalt och fysiskt – de använder dator och telefon för mejlkorrespondens, föredragningar och digitala mötesplattformar (exempelvis Teams), men tillbringar också mycket tid i fysiska sammanträden, på studiebesök och i kontakt med medborgare och intresseorganisationer. Dokumenthantering sker i stor utsträckning via digitala system som riksdagens eller kommunens ärendehanteringssystem, och arbetet kräver löpande läsning av utredningar, motioner och remiss

name: Distriktssköterskor
rationale: District nurses perform predominantly hands-on, physical work including wound care, injections, catheter care, and in-person clinical assessments during home visits, creating strong barriers to direct AI automation. However, AI can meaningfully assist with documentation, care coordination, digital health monitoring, and clinical decision support, moderately increasing productivity without replacing the physical caregiving role.
description: Swedish district nurses primarily perform home visits to assess and treat patients with chronic conditions, wounds, and post-operative care, using medical equipment such as wound care materials, blood pressure monitors, glucometers, and injection supplies. Their work is predominantly physical and hands-on, involving clinical assessments, medication administration, and catheter or stoma care, though they also document patient records digitally in systems like **Cambio Cosmic or TakeCare**. They often work independently in the community, coordinating care between hospitals, GPs, and social services, requiring both clinical judgment and administrative communication via phone and digital health platforms.

name: Storhushållsföreståndare
rationale: Catering directors work predominantly in physical kitchen environments, requiring hands-on supervision of staff, quality control of food, and compliance with hygiene regulations — all of which resist direct AI automation. While AI can assist with menu planning, procurement optimization, scheduling, and budget tracking, the core of the role remains physical presence and practical management that cannot be fully replaced by AI.
description: En storhushållsföreståndare leder och organiserar den dagliga verksamheten i storkök inom exempelvis skolor, sjukhus eller äldreboenden – det handlar om att planera matsedlar, hantera inköp och livsmedelsbudgetar samt se till att livsmedelsregler och hygienföreskrifter (HACCP) följs. Arbetet är övervägande fysiskt och praktiskt, med mycket tid i köket för att handleda och samordna kökspersonal, kontrollera råvaror och kvalitetssäkra matlagning. Digitala verktyg används i varierande grad för schemaläggning, beställningssystem, ekonomiuppföljning och ibland nutritionsberäkningsprogram, men kärnan i arbetet förblir hands-on verk

name: Butikssäljare, dagligvaror
rationale: Grocery retail work is predominantly physical — stocking shelves, handling goods, and assisting customers in person — which creates a strong barrier to direct AI automation. However, self-checkout systems, automated inventory management, and delivery robots are gradually reducing the need for human workers, creating meaningful indirect exposure over time.
description: En butikssäljare inom dagligvaror arbetar huvudsakligen fysiskt med att ta emot och plocka upp varor, fylla på hyllor, hantera kassaarbete samt hjälpa kunder att hitta rätt produkter i butiken. De använder verktyg som kassasystem (POS-terminaler), handdatorer för lagerhantering och prismärkning, samt truckar eller vagnar för varutransport. Arbetet är till övervägande del fysiskt och kundnära, även om enklare digitala system används löpande för scanning, betalningar och ibland beställningar.

name: Apotekstekniker
rationale: Pharmacy technicians have significant physical and customer-facing components — dispensing medications, handling products, and direct patient counseling — that create natural barriers to full AI automation. However, the digital aspects of their work (prescription processing, insurance verification, dosage checking) are increasingly being automated by pharmacy management systems and AI, reducing headcount needs over time.
description: En apotekstekniker arbetar främst i fysisk miljö på apotek där de expedierar recept, plockar och lämnar ut läkemedel samt rådger kunder om receptfria produkter och egenvård. De använder apotekssystem som Pharma, Pascal eller Apoteket/Kronans egna IT-system för att hantera recept, kontrollera doseringar och hantera försäkrings- och förmånsfrågor. Arbetet kombinerar alltså både digitala verktyg för recepthantering och dokumentation med ett utpräglat fysiskt och kundnära inslag i form av plockning, kassaarbete och direktrådgivning.

name: Valsverksoperatörer
rationale: Rolling-mill operators work in physically demanding industrial environments, operating heavy machinery and making hands-on inspections on the production floor, which creates strong barriers to full AI automation. While AI can optimize process parameters and assist with monitoring via HMI systems, the physical presence, real-time sensory judgments, and equipment handling required limit AI exposure to a moderate-low level.
description: En valsverksoperatör arbetar med att forma metall – vanligtvis stål eller aluminium – genom att köra den genom stora valsverk där materialet pressas och sträcks ut till önskad tjocklek och form. Arbetet innebär att övervaka och styra tung industriell utrustning som valsar, ugnar och kylsystem, ofta via kontrollpaneler och datoriserade styrsystem (HMI-system) i ett kontrollrum. Arbetet är en kombination av digitalt och fysiskt – operatören läser instrumentvärden och justerar parametrar digitalt, men gör också fysiska kontroller av materialet och utrustningen direkt på produktionsgolvet i en varm och bullrig miljö.

name: Maskinoperatörer, påfyllning, packning och märkning
name_en: Machine operators, packing, bottling and labelling
rationale: These machine operators work on physical factory floors, loading materials, clearing jams, and monitoring industrial equipment — tasks requiring hands-on presence that AI cannot directly automate in the near term. However, advances in robotics, automated vision systems, and smart conveyor technology gradually reduce the need for human operators on packaging lines, creating meaningful but slower indirect displacement over time.
description:
## Maskinoperatörer, påfyllning, packning och märkning (SSYK 8181)

These workers operate and monitor industrial machines that fill, pack, seal, and label products such as food, beverages, pharmaceuticals, or consumer goods – for example running bottling lines, blister packaging machines, or labelling equipment. Their work is highly **physical and hands-on**, involving tasks like loading raw materials or packaging components, adjusting machine settings, clearing jams, and doing quality checks on finished packages. They work with industrial production machinery, conveyor systems, and may use basic control panels or HMI (human-machine interface) touchscreens, but the core of their work is practical and floor-based rather than digital.

name: Förare av jordbruks- och skogsmaskiner
rationale: This occupation is fundamentally physical, requiring operators to be present in the field managing heavy machinery in challenging terrain and weather conditions, creating a strong barrier to direct AI automation. However, increasing digitalization through GPS-guided autonomous systems, precision agriculture AI, and automated harvesting technology does pose a moderate indirect threat over time, as autonomous agricultural and forestry machines are actively being developed and deployed.
description: En förare av jordbruks- och skogsmaskiner opererar tunga maskiner som skördare, skotare, traktorer och kombinerade lantbruksmaskiner för att utföra uppgifter som avverkning, markberedning, sådd, skörd och transport av gods i skogs- och jordbruksmiljöer. Arbetet är till övervägande del fysiskt och maskinellt, där operatören sitter i maskinens hytt och manövrerar avancerade hydrauliska och mekaniska system, ofta i utmanande terräng och varierande väderförhållanden. Moderna maskiner innehåller dock alltmer digitala komponenter som GPS-styrning, datoriserade produktionssystem och skördaraggregat med inbyggd mätprogramvara, vilket innebär att för

name: Officerare
rationale: Military officers require substantial physical presence, command of troops in field environments, and real-time tactical decision-making under dangerous conditions — strong natural barriers to AI automation. While senior officers' planning, reporting, and administrative tasks have moderate AI exposure, the core leadership, physical training, and combat-readiness functions are deeply human-dependent and institutionally resistant to automation.
description: Swedish commissioned officers (officerare) primarily lead and train military units in both field exercises and garrison environments, planning and executing combat readiness activities, tactical operations, and personnel development. Their work involves a mix of physical fieldwork — commanding troops, conducting exercises with weapons systems, vehicles, and military equipment — and digital/administrative tasks using military planning systems, command-and-control software (such as C2-systems like SWECCIS), and standard office tools for orders, reports, and personnel management. The balance between physical and digital work shifts depending on role and level, where junior officers are more hands-on in the field while senior officers spend considerably more time on planning, briefings, and administrative duties.

name: Barnmorskor
rationale: Midwives perform highly physical, hands-on clinical work including deliveries, gynecological examinations, and fetal monitoring that fundamentally requires physical presence and manual skill, creating strong barriers to direct AI automation. AI can assist with documentation, decision support, and administrative tasks but cannot replace the core obstetric and reproductive health care duties, placing this occupation in a similar range to other hands-on clinical roles like nurses and care assistants.
description: Swedish barnmorskor work primarily in a **physical, hands-on capacity**, conducting prenatal checkups, assisting during labor and delivery, and providing postnatal care and gynecological health services including contraceptive counseling and STI testing. They use medical tools such as ultrasound equipment, fetal heart rate monitors (CTG), speculums, and obstetric instruments, while also documenting patient records in digital healthcare systems like Obstetrix or equivalent journal systems. Beyond maternity care, they independently manage sexual and reproductive health consultations at maternal health clinics (mödravårdscentraler), meaning their work combines direct physical patient examination with continuous digital documentation.

name: Anestesisjuksköterskor
rationale: Anaesthesia nurses perform intensely physical, hands-on work — airway management, IV placement, intubation, and real-time patient monitoring during surgery — that fundamentally requires physical presence and manual dexterity that AI cannot replicate. While AI may assist with documentation, drug dosage calculations, and pattern recognition in monitoring data, the core procedural and crisis-response tasks create a strong natural barrier to automation or significant workforce reduction.
description: Swedish anaesthesia nurses primarily perform hands-on physical work preparing and administering anaesthesia in close collaboration with anaesthesiologists — this includes placing intravenous lines, managing airways (intubation, mask ventilation), monitoring vital signs, and titrating anaesthetic drugs and analgesics throughout surgical procedures. They operate highly specialised medical equipment such as anaesthesia machines, ventilators, infusion pumps, patient monitors (tracking ECG, blood pressure, oxygen saturation, end-tidal CO2), and ultrasound devices for nerve blocks or vascular access. While they document continuously in digital anaesthesia records (e.g. in systems like Orbit or Cambio COSMIC), the core of their work is intensely physical and hands-on rather than desk-based.

name: Intensivvårdssjuksköterskor
rationale: Intensive care nursing is overwhelmingly physical and hands-on — managing ventilators, catheters, infusion pumps, and responding to acute deterioration at the bedside — creating strong barriers to direct automation. While AI can assist with monitoring, early warning systems, and documentation in EHR systems like Metavision, the critical procedural, tactile, and rapid-response human judgment required at the ICU bedside limits AI's ability to either replace or dramatically reduce the need for these highly specialized nurses.
description: Swedish intensive care nurses (**intensivvårdssjuksköterskor**) provide advanced monitoring and treatment of critically ill patients, managing life-supporting equipment such as mechanical ventilators, infusion pumps, dialysis machines, and arterial/central venous catheters. Their work involves continuously assessing patient status, administering complex medication regimens, performing procedures like suctioning and wound care, and responding rapidly to acute deterioration. The work is predominantly **physical and hands-on** at the bedside, though digital tools — including patient monitoring systems, electronic health records (such as Cambio COSMIC or Metavision), and clinical decision support systems — are integral to documentation and patient surveillance.

name: Operationssjuksköterskor
rationale: Operating room nurses perform highly physical, hands-on work in sterile surgical environments — passing instruments, managing sterile fields, and conducting instrument counts — that requires immediate physical presence and real-time tactile judgment that AI cannot replicate. While AI may assist with documentation and scheduling, the core scrub/instrument nurse role has strong physical and safety-critical barriers to automation, placing it near the lower-middle range of exposure.
description: **Operationssjuksköterskor** arbetar i operationssalen där de förbereder och organiserar det sterila operationsfältet, instrumenterar (dvs. räcker instrument och material till operatören under ingreppet) och ansvarar för att rätt kirurgiska instrument, suturer och utrustning finns tillgängliga och är sterilt hanterade. Arbetet är utpräglat **fysiskt och hands-on** – de hanterar skalpeller, klemmer, diatermiapparater, suturförpackningar och komplexa kirurgiska system (t.ex. laparoskopisk eller robotassisterad utrustning) och genomför noggranna räkningskontroller av instrument och dukar före och efter operation. Digitala inslag finns i form av dokumentation i journalsystem (t.ex.

name: Tandläkare
rationale: Dentistry is fundamentally a hands-on, physical occupation requiring manual dexterity with instruments inside a patient's mouth, making direct automation by AI extremely limited in the near term. However, AI does contribute indirectly through diagnostic imaging analysis, treatment planning software, CAD/CAM restoration design, and administrative documentation, providing modest productivity gains without displacing the core clinical role.
description: Swedish dentists (**Tandläkare**) perform hands-on clinical work such as examining teeth and gums, filling cavities, extracting teeth, fitting crowns and bridges, and treating gum disease using physical instruments like drills, scalers, probes, and local anesthetic syringes. Their work is overwhelmingly physical and patient-facing, carried out in a dental chair setting, though digital tools like X-ray imaging software, patient journal systems (e.g., Opus Dental or Dentimed), and CAD/CAM technology for designing restorations are increasingly integrated into the workflow. A typical day involves a scheduled series of patient appointments, combining diagnostic assessments, hands-on treatment procedures, and documentation in digital health records.

name: Sjukgymnaster
